ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v) ==
  /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq b
  /\ \E c \in -1..(b-1) :
      /\ (c # -1) => \E a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c, v)
      /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Init ==
    /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
    /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

IncreaseMaxBal(a, b) ==
  /\ b > maxBal[a]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(a, b, v) ==
    /\ maxBal[a] <= b
    /\ \A vt \in votes[a] : vt[1] # b
    /\ \A c \in Acceptor \ {a} :
         \A vt \in votes[c] : (vt[1] = b) => (vt[2] = v)
    /\ \E Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v)
    /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a] = votes[a] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
    /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = b]
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Next ==
    \E a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot :
        \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a, b)
        \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(a, b, v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<votes, maxBal>>
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
ChosenAt(b, v) ==
    \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b, v)}

---------------------------------------------------------------------------

vars == <<votes, maxBal>>

TypeOK == /\ votes \in [Acceptor -> SUBSET (Ballot \X Value)]
          /\ maxBal \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]

CannotVoteAt(a, b) ==
    /\ maxBal[a] > b
    /\ DidNotVoteAt(a, b)

NoneOtherChoosableAt(b, v) ==
    \E Q \in Quorum :
        \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, b)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
    \A c \in 0..(b-1) : NoneOtherChoosableAt(c, v)

VotesSafe ==
    \A a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
        VotedFor(a, b, v) => SafeAt(b, v)

OneValuePerBallot ==
    \A a1, a2 \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v1, v2 \in Value :
        VotedFor(a1, b, v1) /\ VotedFor(a2, b, v2) => (v1 = v2)

Inv == TypeOK /\ VotesSafe /\ OneValuePerBallot

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

LEMMA QuorumNonEmpty == \A Q \in Quorum : Q # {}
  BY QuorumAssumption

LEMMA InitTypeOK == Init => TypeOK
  BY DEF Init, TypeOK, Ballot

LEMMA InitVotesSafe == Init => VotesSafe
  BY DEF Init, VotesSafe, VotedFor

LEMMA InitOneValuePerBallot == Init => OneValuePerBallot
  BY DEF Init, OneValuePerBallot, VotedFor

LEMMA InitInv == Init => Inv
  BY InitTypeOK, InitVotesSafe, InitOneValuePerBallot DEF Inv

LEMMA InitChosenEmpty == Init => chosen = {}
  BY DEF Init, chosen, ChosenAt, VotedFor, Ballot

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Action-level helpers

LEMMA TypeOK_Step ==
  ASSUME TypeOK, [Next]_vars
  PROVE  TypeOK'
PROOF
<1> SUFFICES ASSUME TypeOK,
                    [Next]_vars
             PROVE  TypeOK'
  OBVIOUS
<1>1. CASE UNCHANGED vars
  BY <1>1 DEF TypeOK, vars
<1>2. CASE Next
  <2>1. PICK a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot :
          \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a, b)
          \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(a, b, v)
    BY <1>2 DEF Next
  <2>2. CASE IncreaseMaxBal(a, b)
    <3>1. votes' = votes BY <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
    <3>2. maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = b] BY <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
    <3>3. b \in Ballot \cup {-1} BY DEF Ballot
    <3>4. maxBal' \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]
      BY <3>2, <3>3 DEF TypeOK
    <3>. QED BY <3>1, <3>4 DEF TypeOK
  <2>3. CASE \E v \in Value : VoteFor(a, b, v)
    <3>1. PICK v \in Value : VoteFor(a, b, v) BY <2>3
    <3>2. votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a] = votes[a] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
      BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
    <3>3. maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = b]
      BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
    <3>4. votes[a] \in SUBSET (Ballot \X Value) BY DEF TypeOK
    <3>5. <<b, v>> \in Ballot \X Value BY DEF Ballot
    <3>6. votes[a] \cup {<<b, v>>} \in SUBSET (Ballot \X Value)
      BY <3>4, <3>5
    <3>7. votes' \in [Acceptor -> SUBSET (Ballot \X Value)]
      BY <3>2, <3>6 DEF TypeOK
    <3>8. b \in Ballot \cup {-1} BY DEF Ballot
    <3>9. maxBal' \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]
      BY <3>3, <3>8 DEF TypeOK
    <3>. QED BY <3>7, <3>9 DEF TypeOK
  <2>. QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3
<1>. QED BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Monotonicity of votes

LEMMA Votes_Monotone ==
  ASSUME TypeOK, [Next]_vars,
         NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value,
         VotedFor(a, b, v)
  PROVE  VotedFor(a, b, v)'
PROOF
<1>1. CASE UNCHANGED vars
  BY <1>1 DEF vars, VotedFor
<1>2. CASE Next
  <2>1. PICK a2 \in Acceptor, b2 \in Ballot :
          \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a2, b2)
          \/ \E v2 \in Value : VoteFor(a2, b2, v2)
    BY <1>2 DEF Next
  <2>2. CASE IncreaseMaxBal(a2, b2)
    BY <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal, VotedFor
  <2>3. CASE \E v2 \in Value : VoteFor(a2, b2, v2)
    <3>1. PICK v2 \in Value : VoteFor(a2, b2, v2) BY <2>3
    <3>2. votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a2] = votes[a2] \cup {<<b2, v2>>}]
      BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
    <3>3. <<b, v>> \in votes[a] BY DEF VotedFor
    <3>4. CASE a = a2
      <4>1. votes'[a] = votes[a] \cup {<<b2, v2>>}
        BY <3>2, <3>4 DEF TypeOK
      <4>. QED BY <3>3, <4>1 DEF VotedFor
    <3>5. CASE a # a2
      <4>1. votes'[a] = votes[a]
        BY <3>2, <3>5 DEF TypeOK
      <4>. QED BY <3>3, <4>1 DEF VotedFor
    <3>. QED BY <3>4, <3>5
  <2>. QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3
<1>. QED BY <1>1, <1>2

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Chosen is monotonic

LEMMA Chosen_Monotone ==
  ASSUME TypeOK, [Next]_vars
  PROVE  chosen \subseteq chosen'
PROOF
<1>. SUFFICES ASSUME TypeOK, [Next]_vars,
                     NEW v \in chosen
              PROVE  v \in chosen'
  OBVIOUS
<1>1. v \in Value /\ \E b \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b, v) BY DEF chosen
<1>2. PICK b \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b, v) BY <1>1
<1>3. PICK Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v) BY <1>2 DEF ChosenAt
<1>4. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)'
  <2>. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Q PROVE VotedFor(a, b, v)'
    OBVIOUS
  <2>1. a \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption
  <2>2. VotedFor(a, b, v) BY <1>3
  <2>. QED BY Votes_Monotone, <2>1, <2>2
<1>5. ChosenAt(b, v)' BY <1>4 DEF ChosenAt
<1>. QED BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>5 DEF chosen

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* SafeAt stability

LEMMA SafeAt_Step ==
  ASSUME TypeOK, [Next]_vars,
         NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value,
         SafeAt(b, v)
  PROVE  SafeAt(b, v)'
PROOF
<1>. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW c \in 0..(b-1)
              PROVE  NoneOtherChoosableAt(c, v)'
  BY DEF SafeAt
<1>1. NoneOtherChoosableAt(c, v) BY DEF SafeAt
<1>2. PICK Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, c)
  BY <1>1 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
<1>3. c \in Ballot BY DEF Ballot
<1>4. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c, v)' \/ CannotVoteAt(a, c)'
  <2>. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Q
                PROVE  VotedFor(a, c, v)' \/ CannotVoteAt(a, c)'
    OBVIOUS
  <2>1. a \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption
  <2>2. VotedFor(a, c, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, c) BY <1>2
  <2>3. CASE VotedFor(a, c, v)
    <3>1. VotedFor(a, c, v)' BY <2>1, <1>3, Votes_Monotone, <2>3
    <3>. QED BY <3>1
  <2>4. CASE CannotVoteAt(a, c)
    <3>0. maxBal[a] > c /\ DidNotVoteAt(a, c) BY <2>4 DEF CannotVoteAt
    <3>00. maxBal[a] \in Ballot \cup {-1} BY <2>1 DEF TypeOK
    <3>0a. maxBal[a] \in Int BY <3>00 DEF Ballot
    <3>1. CASE UNCHANGED vars
      <4>1. maxBal[a]' = maxBal[a] BY <3>1 DEF vars
      <4>2. votes[a]' = votes[a] BY <3>1 DEF vars
      <4>3. DidNotVoteAt(a, c)' BY <3>0, <4>2 DEF DidNotVoteAt, VotedFor
      <4>4. maxBal[a]' > c BY <3>0, <4>1
      <4>. QED BY <4>3, <4>4 DEF CannotVoteAt
    <3>2. CASE Next
      <4>1. PICK a2 \in Acceptor, b2 \in Ballot :
              \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a2, b2)
              \/ \E v2 \in Value : VoteFor(a2, b2, v2)
        BY <3>2 DEF Next
      <4>2. CASE IncreaseMaxBal(a2, b2)
        <5>1. votes' = votes BY <4>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
        <5>2. DidNotVoteAt(a, c)'
          BY <3>0, <5>1 DEF DidNotVoteAt, VotedFor
        <5>3. CASE a = a2
          <6>1. maxBal[a2]' = b2 BY <4>2, <5>3 DEF IncreaseMaxBal, TypeOK
          <6>2. maxBal[a]' = b2 BY <5>3, <6>1
          <6>3. b2 \in Ballot BY DEF Ballot
          <6>4. b2 > maxBal[a2] BY <4>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
          <6>5. b2 > maxBal[a] BY <5>3, <6>4
          <6>6. maxBal[a]' > c BY <6>2, <6>5, <3>0, <3>0a, <6>3 DEF Ballot
          <6>. QED BY <5>2, <6>6 DEF CannotVoteAt
        <5>4. CASE a # a2
          <6>1. maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a2] = b2] BY <4>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
          <6>2. maxBal[a]' = maxBal[a] BY <5>4, <6>1 DEF TypeOK
          <6>. QED BY <5>2, <6>2, <3>0 DEF CannotVoteAt
        <5>. QED BY <5>3, <5>4
      <4>3. CASE \E v2 \in Value : VoteFor(a2, b2, v2)
        <5>1. PICK v2 \in Value : VoteFor(a2, b2, v2) BY <4>3
        <5>2. votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a2] = votes[a2] \cup {<<b2, v2>>}]
          BY <5>1 DEF VoteFor
        <5>3. maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a2] = b2]
          BY <5>1 DEF VoteFor
        <5>4. maxBal[a2] <= b2 BY <5>1 DEF VoteFor
        <5>5. CASE a = a2
          <6>1. maxBal[a]' = b2 BY <5>3, <5>5 DEF TypeOK
          <6>2. votes[a]' = votes[a] \cup {<<b2, v2>>} BY <5>2, <5>5 DEF TypeOK
          <6>3. b2 \in Ballot BY DEF Ballot
          <6>4. maxBal[a] <= b2 BY <5>4, <5>5
          \* maxBal[a] > c and maxBal[a] <= b2, so c < b2
          <6>5. c < b2
            <7>1. c < maxBal[a] BY <3>0, <3>0a, <6>3 DEF Ballot
            <7>. QED BY <6>4, <7>1, <3>0a, <6>3 DEF Ballot
          <6>6. b2 > c BY <6>5
          <6>7. maxBal[a]' > c BY <6>1, <6>6
          \* DidNotVoteAt(a, c)' = \A v3 : ~VotedFor(a, c, v3)'
          \* VotedFor(a, c, v3)' = <<c, v3>> \in votes'[a] = votes[a] \cup {<<b2, v2>>}
          \* Since c < b2, <<c, v3>> # <<b2, v2>> (as ballots differ).
          \* So <<c, v3>> \in votes[a] iff <<c, v3>> \in votes[a].
          \* So VotedFor(a, c, v3)' iff VotedFor(a, c, v3), and DidNotVoteAt(a, c) holds.
          <6>8. DidNotVoteAt(a, c)'
            <7>. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW v3 \in Value
                          PROVE  ~ VotedFor(a, c, v3)'
              BY DEF DidNotVoteAt
            <7>1. ~ VotedFor(a, c, v3) BY <3>0 DEF DidNotVoteAt
            <7>2. <<c, v3>> \notin votes[a] BY <7>1 DEF VotedFor
            <7>3. c # b2 BY <6>5
            <7>4. <<c, v3>> # <<b2, v2>> BY <7>3
            <7>5. <<c, v3>> \notin votes[a] \cup {<<b2, v2>>} BY <7>2, <7>4
            <7>6. <<c, v3>> \notin votes'[a] BY <7>5, <6>2
            <7>. QED BY <7>6 DEF VotedFor
          <6>. QED BY <6>7, <6>8 DEF CannotVoteAt
        <5>6. CASE a # a2
          <6>1. maxBal[a]' = maxBal[a] BY <5>3, <5>6 DEF TypeOK
          <6>2. votes[a]' = votes[a] BY <5>2, <5>6 DEF TypeOK
          <6>3. DidNotVoteAt(a, c)' BY <3>0, <6>2 DEF DidNotVoteAt, VotedFor
          <6>. QED BY <6>1, <6>3, <3>0 DEF CannotVoteAt
        <5>. QED BY <5>5, <5>6
      <4>. QED BY <4>1, <4>2, <4>3
    <3>. QED BY <3>1, <3>2 DEF vars
  <2>. QED BY <2>2, <2>3, <2>4
<1>. QED BY <1>4 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* AllSafeAtZero: any value is safe at ballot 0

LEMMA AllSafeAtZero == \A v \in Value : SafeAt(0, v)
PROOF
<1>. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW v \in Value
              PROVE  SafeAt(0, v)
  OBVIOUS
<1>1. 0..(0-1) = {}
  OBVIOUS
<1>. QED BY <1>1 DEF SafeAt

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* ShowsSafety: ShowsSafeAt implies SafeAt under Inv

LEMMA ShowsSafety ==
  ASSUME Inv,
         NEW Q \in Quorum, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value,
         ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v)
  PROVE  SafeAt(b, v)
PROOF
<1>. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW d \in 0..(b-1)
              PROVE  NoneOtherChoosableAt(d, v)
  BY DEF SafeAt
<1>1. PICK c \in -1..(b-1) :
        /\ (c # -1) => \E aa \in Q : VotedFor(aa, c, v)
        /\ \A dd \in (c+1)..(b-1), aa \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(aa, dd)
  BY DEF ShowsSafeAt
<1>2. \A aa \in Q : maxBal[aa] \geq b BY DEF ShowsSafeAt
<1>3. b \in Nat BY DEF Ballot
<1>4. c \in Int /\ c >= -1 /\ c <= b - 1
  BY <1>3
<1>5. d \in Int /\ d >= 0 /\ d <= b - 1
  BY <1>3
<1>6. CASE d = c
  <2>1. c # -1 BY <1>6, <1>5
  <2>2. PICK aa \in Q : VotedFor(aa, c, v) BY <1>1, <2>1
  <2>3. VotedFor(aa, d, v) BY <2>2, <1>6
  <2>4. \E QQ \in Quorum : \A x \in QQ : VotedFor(x, d, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(x, d)
    <3>. WITNESS Q \in Quorum
    <3>1. \A x \in Q : VotedFor(x, d, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(x, d)
      <4>. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW x \in Q
                    PROVE  VotedFor(x, d, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(x, d)
        OBVIOUS
      \* Same Q votes for v at c=d
      <4>1. x \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption
      <4>2. CASE x = aa
        BY <2>3, <4>2
      <4>3. CASE x # aa
        \* The only votes at d=c by quorum members might not be uniform.
        \* But we have OneValuePerBallot: aa votes for v at d, so any other vote at d is for v.
        \* But x may not have voted at d. If not, we need CannotVoteAt(x, d), which requires
        \* maxBal[x] > d and DidNotVoteAt(x, d).
        \* From ShowsSafeAt, maxBal[x] >= b > d, so maxBal[x] > d.
        \* But DidNotVoteAt(x, d) is not given. Hmm.
        \*
        \* Actually for x in Q, x voted for v at c=d (we have \E a in Q : VotedFor(a, c, v),
        \* which gives one aa, but not all). Let me reconsider.
        \*
        \* Looking at the ShowsSafeAt:
        \* /\ \E a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c, v) -- some a in Q voted for v at c
        \* /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d) -- between c+1 and b-1, no Q member voted
        \*
        \* For c = d:
        \* We have aa votes for v at d. Other x in Q may or may not have voted at d.
        \* If x voted at d, by OneValuePerBallot, x voted for v at d, so VotedFor(x, d, v) ✓.
        \* If x didn't vote at d, then DidNotVoteAt(x, d). With maxBal[x] >= b > d, CannotVoteAt(x, d) ✓.
        <4>4. CASE DidNotVoteAt(x, d)
          <5>1. maxBal[x] \geq b BY <1>2
          <5>2. b > d
            <6>1. d \in Nat BY <1>5
            <6>2. b > d
              <7>1. d \in 0..(b-1) BY DEF SafeAt
              <7>. QED BY <1>3
            <6>. QED BY <6>2
          <5>3. maxBal[x] \in Ballot \cup {-1} BY <4>1 DEF TypeOK, Inv
          <5>4. maxBal[x] > d BY <5>1, <5>2, <5>3 DEF Ballot
          <5>. QED BY <5>4, <4>4 DEF CannotVoteAt
        <4>5. CASE ~ DidNotVoteAt(x, d)
          <5>1. \E vv \in Value : VotedFor(x, d, vv) BY <4>5 DEF DidNotVoteAt
          <5>2. PICK vv \in Value : VotedFor(x, d, vv) BY <5>1
          <5>3. VotedFor(aa, d, v) BY <2>3
          <5>4. aa \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption
          <5>5. d \in Ballot BY <1>5 DEF Ballot
          <5>6. vv = v BY <5>2, <5>3, <4>1, <5>4, <5>5 DEF OneValuePerBallot, Inv
          <5>7. VotedFor(x, d, v) BY <5>2, <5>6
          <5>. QED BY <5>7
        <4>. QED BY <4>4, <4>5
      <4>. QED BY <4>2, <4>3
    <3>. QED BY <3>1
  <2>. QED BY <2>4 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
<1>7. CASE d # c
  <2>1. d \in (c+1)..(b-1)
    <3>1. c # -1 => c \in 0..(b-1)
      <4>. SUFFICES ASSUME c # -1 PROVE c \in 0..(b-1)
        OBVIOUS
      <4>. QED BY <1>4
    <3>2. CASE c = -1
      <4>1. d \in 0..(b-1) BY <1>5
      <4>2. c+1 = 0 BY <3>2
      <4>. QED BY <4>1, <4>2
    <3>3. CASE c # -1
      \* c >= 0. d >= 0 and d # c. We need d >= c+1.
      \* Since c was the largest ballot with a vote in Q at v, and d is between 0 and b-1 with d # c,
      \* either d < c or d > c.
      \* Hmm, but if d < c and c # -1, what's the situation? Let me look at the ShowsSafeAt again:
      \* /\ \A d2 \in (c+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d2)
      \* So between c+1 and b-1, no Q member voted. But for ballots < c, we don't have this.
      \*
      \* Hmm. So for d < c (and c >= 0), we need NoneOtherChoosableAt(d, v). But ShowsSafeAt
      \* doesn't directly give us this.
      \*
      \* But wait! Voter aa voted for v at c. By VotesSafe, SafeAt(c, v). So for d < c,
      \* NoneOtherChoosableAt(d, v) follows from SafeAt(c, v).
      \*
      \* So this case requires using VotesSafe of aa's vote.
      <4>1. d \in 0..(b-1) BY <1>5
      <4>2. c \in 0..(b-1) BY <3>1, <3>3
      <4>3. PICK aa \in Q : VotedFor(aa, c, v) BY <1>1, <3>3
      <4>4. aa \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption
      <4>5. c \in Ballot BY <4>2 DEF Ballot
      <4>6. SafeAt(c, v) BY <4>3, <4>4, <4>5 DEF VotesSafe, Inv
      <4>7. CASE d < c
        <5>1. d \in 0..(c-1)
          BY <4>1, <4>2, <4>7
        <5>2. NoneOtherChoosableAt(d, v) BY <5>1, <4>6 DEF SafeAt
        <5>. QED BY <5>2
      <4>8. CASE d > c
        <5>1. d >= c + 1 BY <4>8, <1>5, <4>2
        <5>2. d \in (c+1)..(b-1) BY <5>1, <4>1
        <5>. QED BY <5>2
      <4>9. CASE d = c
        BY <4>9, <1>7
      <4>. QED BY <4>7, <4>8, <4>9
    <3>. QED BY <3>2, <3>3
  <2>2. \A aa \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(aa, d) BY <2>1, <1>1
  <2>3. \E QQ \in Quorum : \A aa \in QQ : VotedFor(aa, d, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(aa, d)
    <3>. WITNESS Q \in Quorum
    <3>1. \A aa \in Q : VotedFor(aa, d, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(aa, d)
      <4>. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW aa \in Q
                    PROVE  VotedFor(aa, d, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(aa, d)
        OBVIOUS
      <4>1. aa \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption
      <4>2. DidNotVoteAt(aa, d) BY <2>2
      <4>3. maxBal[aa] \geq b BY <1>2
      <4>4. b > d
        <5>1. d \in Nat BY <1>5
        <5>2. d \in 0..(b-1) BY DEF SafeAt
        <5>3. b > d BY <5>1, <5>2, <1>3
        <5>. QED BY <5>3
      <4>5. maxBal[aa] \in Ballot \cup {-1} BY <4>1 DEF TypeOK, Inv
      <4>6. maxBal[aa] > d BY <4>3, <4>4, <4>5 DEF Ballot
      <4>7. CannotVoteAt(aa, d) BY <4>2, <4>6 DEF CannotVoteAt
      <4>. QED BY <4>7
    <3>. QED BY <3>1
  <2>. QED BY <2>3 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
<1>. QED BY <1>6, <1>7

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* OneValuePerBallot preservation

LEMMA OneValuePerBallot_Step ==
  ASSUME Inv, [Next]_vars
  PROVE  OneValuePerBallot'
PROOF
<1>. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a1 \in Acceptor, NEW a2 \in Acceptor,
                     NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v1 \in Value, NEW v2 \in Value,
                     VotedFor(a1, b, v1)', VotedFor(a2, b, v2)'
              PROVE  v1 = v2
  BY DEF OneValuePerBallot
<1>1. CASE UNCHANGED vars
  <2>1. votes' = votes BY <1>1 DEF vars
  <2>2. VotedFor(a1, b, v1) BY <2>1 DEF VotedFor
  <2>3. VotedFor(a2, b, v2) BY <2>1 DEF VotedFor
  <2>. QED BY <2>2, <2>3 DEF OneValuePerBallot, Inv
<1>2. CASE Next
  <2>1. PICK a3 \in Acceptor, b3 \in Ballot :
          \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a3, b3)
          \/ \E v3 \in Value : VoteFor(a3, b3, v3)
    BY <1>2 DEF Next
  <2>2. CASE IncreaseMaxBal(a3, b3)
    <3>1. votes' = votes BY <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
    <3>2. VotedFor(a1, b, v1) BY <3>1 DEF VotedFor
    <3>3. VotedFor(a2, b, v2) BY <3>1 DEF VotedFor
    <3>. QED BY <3>2, <3>3 DEF OneValuePerBallot, Inv
  <2>3. CASE \E v3 \in Value : VoteFor(a3, b3, v3)
    <3>1. PICK v3 \in Value : VoteFor(a3, b3, v3) BY <2>3
    <3>2. votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a3] = votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>}]
      BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
    <3>3. \A vt \in votes[a3] : vt[1] # b3 BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
    <3>4. \A c \in Acceptor \ {a3} : \A vt \in votes[c] : vt[1] = b3 => vt[2] = v3
      BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
    <3>5. votes'[a3] = votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>}
      BY <3>2 DEF TypeOK, Inv
    <3>6. \A x \in Acceptor \ {a3} : votes'[x] = votes[x]
      BY <3>2 DEF TypeOK, Inv
    \* Now analyze a1 and a2.
    \* VotedFor(a1, b, v1)' means <<b, v1>> \in votes'[a1].
    \* If a1 = a3, then votes'[a3] = votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>}. So <<b, v1>> \in votes[a3] or <<b, v1>> = <<b3, v3>>.
    \* Similarly for a2.
    <3>7. CASE a1 = a3 /\ a2 = a3
      <4>1. <<b, v1>> \in votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>} BY <3>5, <3>7 DEF VotedFor
      <4>2. <<b, v2>> \in votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>} BY <3>5, <3>7 DEF VotedFor
      <4>3. CASE <<b, v1>> = <<b3, v3>> /\ <<b, v2>> = <<b3, v3>>
        BY <4>3
      <4>4. CASE <<b, v1>> = <<b3, v3>> /\ <<b, v2>> \in votes[a3]
        <5>1. b = b3 BY <4>4
        <5>2. v1 = v3 BY <4>4
        <5>3. <<b, v2>> \in votes[a3] /\ (<<b, v2>>)[1] = b BY <4>4
        <5>4. \E vt \in votes[a3] : vt[1] = b3 BY <5>1, <5>3
        <5>5. FALSE BY <5>4, <3>3, <5>1
        <5>. QED BY <5>5
      <4>5. CASE <<b, v1>> \in votes[a3] /\ <<b, v2>> = <<b3, v3>>
        <5>1. b = b3 BY <4>5
        <5>2. <<b, v1>> \in votes[a3] /\ (<<b, v1>>)[1] = b BY <4>5
        <5>3. FALSE BY <5>2, <3>3, <5>1
        <5>. QED BY <5>3
      <4>6. CASE <<b, v1>> \in votes[a3] /\ <<b, v2>> \in votes[a3]
        <5>1. VotedFor(a3, b, v1) BY <4>6 DEF VotedFor
        <5>2. VotedFor(a3, b, v2) BY <4>6 DEF VotedFor
        <5>. QED BY <5>1, <5>2 DEF OneValuePerBallot, Inv
      <4>. QED BY <4>1, <4>2, <4>3, <4>4, <4>5, <4>6
    <3>8. CASE a1 = a3 /\ a2 # a3
      <4>1. <<b, v1>> \in votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>} BY <3>5, <3>8 DEF VotedFor
      <4>2. votes'[a2] = votes[a2] BY <3>6, <3>8
      <4>3. <<b, v2>> \in votes[a2] BY <4>2 DEF VotedFor
      <4>4. VotedFor(a2, b, v2) BY <4>3 DEF VotedFor
      <4>5. CASE <<b, v1>> = <<b3, v3>>
        <5>1. b = b3 BY <4>5
        <5>2. v1 = v3 BY <4>5
        <5>3. (<<b, v2>>)[1] = b3 BY <5>1
        <5>4. (<<b, v2>>)[2] = v3 BY <3>4, <4>3, <3>8, <5>3
        <5>5. v2 = v3 BY <5>4
        <5>. QED BY <5>2, <5>5
      <4>6. CASE <<b, v1>> \in votes[a3]
        <5>1. VotedFor(a3, b, v1) BY <4>6 DEF VotedFor
        <5>. QED BY <5>1, <4>4 DEF OneValuePerBallot, Inv
      <4>. QED BY <4>1, <4>5, <4>6
    <3>9. CASE a1 # a3 /\ a2 = a3
      <4>1. <<b, v2>> \in votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>} BY <3>5, <3>9 DEF VotedFor
      <4>2. votes'[a1] = votes[a1] BY <3>6, <3>9
      <4>3. <<b, v1>> \in votes[a1] BY <4>2 DEF VotedFor
      <4>4. VotedFor(a1, b, v1) BY <4>3 DEF VotedFor
      <4>5. CASE <<b, v2>> = <<b3, v3>>
        <5>1. b = b3 BY <4>5
        <5>2. v2 = v3 BY <4>5
        <5>3. (<<b, v1>>)[1] = b3 BY <5>1
        <5>4. (<<b, v1>>)[2] = v3 BY <3>4, <4>3, <3>9, <5>3
        <5>5. v1 = v3 BY <5>4
        <5>. QED BY <5>2, <5>5
      <4>6. CASE <<b, v2>> \in votes[a3]
        <5>1. VotedFor(a3, b, v2) BY <4>6 DEF VotedFor
        <5>. QED BY <5>1, <4>4 DEF OneValuePerBallot, Inv
      <4>. QED BY <4>1, <4>5, <4>6
    <3>10. CASE a1 # a3 /\ a2 # a3
      <4>1. votes'[a1] = votes[a1] BY <3>6, <3>10
      <4>2. votes'[a2] = votes[a2] BY <3>6, <3>10
      <4>3. VotedFor(a1, b, v1) BY <4>1 DEF VotedFor
      <4>4. VotedFor(a2, b, v2) BY <4>2 DEF VotedFor
      <4>. QED BY <4>3, <4>4 DEF OneValuePerBallot, Inv
    <3>. QED BY <3>7, <3>8, <3>9, <3>10
  <2>. QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3
<1>. QED BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* VotesSafe preservation

LEMMA VotesSafe_Step ==
  ASSUME Inv, [Next]_vars
  PROVE  VotesSafe'
PROOF
<1>. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value,
                     VotedFor(a, b, v)'
              PROVE  SafeAt(b, v)'
  BY DEF VotesSafe
<1>1. CASE UNCHANGED vars
  <2>1. votes' = votes BY <1>1 DEF vars
  <2>2. VotedFor(a, b, v) BY <2>1 DEF VotedFor
  <2>3. SafeAt(b, v) BY <2>2 DEF VotesSafe, Inv
  <2>4. TypeOK BY DEF Inv
  <2>. QED BY <2>3, <2>4, <1>1, SafeAt_Step
<1>2. CASE Next
  <2>1. PICK a3 \in Acceptor, b3 \in Ballot :
          \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a3, b3)
          \/ \E v3 \in Value : VoteFor(a3, b3, v3)
    BY <1>2 DEF Next
  <2>2. CASE IncreaseMaxBal(a3, b3)
    <3>1. votes' = votes BY <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
    <3>2. VotedFor(a, b, v) BY <3>1 DEF VotedFor
    <3>3. SafeAt(b, v) BY <3>2 DEF VotesSafe, Inv
    <3>4. TypeOK BY DEF Inv
    <3>5. [Next]_vars BY <1>2
    <3>. QED BY <3>3, <3>4, <3>5, SafeAt_Step
  <2>3. CASE \E v3 \in Value : VoteFor(a3, b3, v3)
    <3>1. PICK v3 \in Value : VoteFor(a3, b3, v3) BY <2>3
    <3>2. votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a3] = votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>}]
      BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
    <3>3. \E Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, b3, v3) BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
    <3>4. votes'[a3] = votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>}
      BY <3>2 DEF TypeOK, Inv
    <3>5. \A x \in Acceptor \ {a3} : votes'[x] = votes[x]
      BY <3>2 DEF TypeOK, Inv
    <3>6. CASE a = a3
      <4>1. <<b, v>> \in votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>} BY <3>4, <3>6 DEF VotedFor
      <4>2. CASE <<b, v>> = <<b3, v3>>
        <5>1. b = b3 BY <4>2
        <5>2. v = v3 BY <4>2
        <5>3. PICK Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, b3, v3) BY <3>3
        <5>4. SafeAt(b3, v3) BY <5>3, ShowsSafety
        <5>5. SafeAt(b, v) BY <5>1, <5>2, <5>4
        <5>6. TypeOK BY DEF Inv
        <5>. QED BY <5>5, <5>6, <1>2, SafeAt_Step
      <4>3. CASE <<b, v>> \in votes[a3]
        <5>1. VotedFor(a3, b, v) BY <4>3 DEF VotedFor
        <5>2. SafeAt(b, v) BY <5>1 DEF VotesSafe, Inv
        <5>3. TypeOK BY DEF Inv
        <5>. QED BY <5>2, <5>3, <1>2, SafeAt_Step
      <4>. QED BY <4>1, <4>2, <4>3
    <3>7. CASE a # a3
      <4>1. votes'[a] = votes[a] BY <3>5, <3>7
      <4>2. <<b, v>> \in votes[a] BY <4>1 DEF VotedFor
      <4>3. VotedFor(a, b, v) BY <4>2 DEF VotedFor
      <4>4. SafeAt(b, v) BY <4>3 DEF VotesSafe, Inv
      <4>5. TypeOK BY DEF Inv
      <4>. QED BY <4>4, <4>5, <1>2, SafeAt_Step
    <3>. QED BY <3>6, <3>7
  <2>. QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3
<1>. QED BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Inv is preserved by Next

LEMMA Inv_Step ==
  ASSUME Inv, [Next]_vars
  PROVE  Inv'
PROOF
<1>1. TypeOK BY DEF Inv
<1>2. TypeOK' BY <1>1, TypeOK_Step
<1>3. VotesSafe' BY VotesSafe_Step
<1>4. OneValuePerBallot' BY OneValuePerBallot_Step
<1>. QED BY <1>2, <1>3, <1>4 DEF Inv

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Spec implies always Inv

LEMMA Spec_Inv == Spec => []Inv
PROOF
<1>1. Init => Inv BY InitInv
<1>2. Inv /\ [Next]_vars => Inv' BY Inv_Step
<1>. QED BY <1>1, <1>2, PTL DEF Spec, vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* OneVote follows from OneValuePerBallot

LEMMA OneVote_Lemma ==
  ASSUME Inv,
         NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW b \in Ballot,
         NEW v \in Value, NEW w \in Value,
         VotedFor(a, b, v), VotedFor(a, b, w)
  PROVE  v = w
PROOF
  BY DEF OneValuePerBallot, Inv

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Under Inv, chosen has at most one element

LEMMA Inv_ChosenSingleton ==
  ASSUME Inv,
         NEW v1 \in chosen, NEW v2 \in chosen
  PROVE  v1 = v2
PROOF
<1>1. v1 \in Value /\ v2 \in Value BY DEF chosen
<1>2. PICK b1 \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b1, v1) BY DEF chosen
<1>3. PICK b2 \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b2, v2) BY DEF chosen
<1>4. PICK Q1 \in Quorum : \A a \in Q1 : VotedFor(a, b1, v1) BY <1>2 DEF ChosenAt
<1>5. PICK Q2 \in Quorum : \A a \in Q2 : VotedFor(a, b2, v2) BY <1>3 DEF ChosenAt
<1>6. CASE b1 = b2
  <2>1. PICK a \in Q1 \cap Q2 : TRUE BY QuorumAssumption
  <2>2. VotedFor(a, b1, v1) BY <1>4, <2>1
  <2>3. VotedFor(a, b2, v2) BY <1>5, <2>1
  <2>4. VotedFor(a, b1, v2) BY <2>3, <1>6
  <2>5. a \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption, <2>1
  <2>. QED BY <2>2, <2>4, <2>5, OneVote_Lemma, <1>1
<1>7. CASE b1 # b2
  <2>1. CASE b1 < b2
    \* SafeAt(b2, v2) and at ballot b1, NoneOtherChoosableAt(b1, v2) (since b1 < b2).
    \* But quorum Q1 voted for v1 at b1, so NoneOtherChoosableAt(b1, v2) requires
    \* some Q' such that all in Q' have VotedFor(_, b1, v2) or CannotVoteAt(_, b1).
    \* Q' \cap Q1 has some element a. VotedFor(a, b1, v1) and a \in Q' has either VotedFor(a, b1, v2) or CannotVoteAt(a, b1).
    \* If VotedFor(a, b1, v2), then by OneVote, v1 = v2 (contradicts v1 # v2). But wait, v1 might = v2.
    \* If CannotVoteAt(a, b1), then DidNotVoteAt(a, b1), contradicts VotedFor(a, b1, v1).
    \* So in both cases, either v1 = v2 (which is what we want) or contradiction.
    <3>1. PICK a \in Q2 : VotedFor(a, b2, v2) BY <1>5, QuorumNonEmpty
    <3>2. a \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption
    <3>3. SafeAt(b2, v2) BY <3>1, <3>2 DEF VotesSafe, Inv
    <3>4. b1 \in 0..(b2 - 1) BY <2>1 DEF Ballot
    <3>5. NoneOtherChoosableAt(b1, v2) BY <3>3, <3>4 DEF SafeAt
    <3>6. PICK Q3 \in Quorum :
           \A a3 \in Q3 : VotedFor(a3, b1, v2) \/ CannotVoteAt(a3, b1)
      BY <3>5 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
    <3>7. PICK x \in Q1 \cap Q3 : TRUE BY QuorumAssumption
    <3>8. x \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption, <3>7
    <3>9. VotedFor(x, b1, v1) BY <1>4, <3>7
    <3>10. VotedFor(x, b1, v2) \/ CannotVoteAt(x, b1) BY <3>6, <3>7
    <3>11. ~ CannotVoteAt(x, b1)
      <4>1. ~ DidNotVoteAt(x, b1)
        <5>1. ASSUME DidNotVoteAt(x, b1) PROVE FALSE
          <6>1. ~ VotedFor(x, b1, v1) BY <5>1 DEF DidNotVoteAt
          <6>. QED BY <6>1, <3>9
        <5>. QED BY <5>1
      <4>. QED BY <4>1 DEF CannotVoteAt
    <3>12. VotedFor(x, b1, v2) BY <3>10, <3>11
    <3>. QED BY <3>9, <3>12, <3>8, OneVote_Lemma, <1>1
  <2>2. CASE b2 < b1
    <3>1. PICK a \in Q1 : VotedFor(a, b1, v1) BY <1>4, QuorumNonEmpty
    <3>2. a \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption
    <3>3. SafeAt(b1, v1) BY <3>1, <3>2 DEF VotesSafe, Inv
    <3>4. b2 \in 0..(b1 - 1) BY <2>2 DEF Ballot
    <3>5. NoneOtherChoosableAt(b2, v1) BY <3>3, <3>4 DEF SafeAt
    <3>6. PICK Q3 \in Quorum :
           \A a3 \in Q3 : VotedFor(a3, b2, v1) \/ CannotVoteAt(a3, b2)
      BY <3>5 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
    <3>7. PICK x \in Q2 \cap Q3 : TRUE BY QuorumAssumption
    <3>8. x \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption, <3>7
    <3>9. VotedFor(x, b2, v2) BY <1>5, <3>7
    <3>10. VotedFor(x, b2, v1) \/ CannotVoteAt(x, b2) BY <3>6, <3>7
    <3>11. ~ CannotVoteAt(x, b2)
      <4>1. ~ DidNotVoteAt(x, b2)
        <5>1. ASSUME DidNotVoteAt(x, b2) PROVE FALSE
          <6>1. ~ VotedFor(x, b2, v2) BY <5>1 DEF DidNotVoteAt
          <6>. QED BY <6>1, <3>9
        <5>. QED BY <5>1
      <4>. QED BY <4>1 DEF CannotVoteAt
    <3>12. VotedFor(x, b2, v1) BY <3>10, <3>11
    <3>. QED BY <3>9, <3>12, <3>8, OneVote_Lemma, <1>1
  <2>. QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <1>7 DEF Ballot
<1>. QED BY <1>6, <1>7

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Refinement step

LEMMA Refinement_Step ==
  ASSUME Inv, Inv', [Next]_vars
  PROVE  [C!Next]_chosen
PROOF
<1>. SUFFICES ASSUME chosen' # chosen
              PROVE  C!Next
  BY DEF C!Next
<1>1. chosen \subseteq chosen' BY Chosen_Monotone DEF Inv
<1>2. PICK v \in chosen' \ chosen : TRUE
  <2>1. chosen' \ chosen # {}
    <3>1. chosen' # chosen BY DEF chosen
    <3>. QED BY <3>1, <1>1
  <2>. QED BY <2>1
<1>3. v \in Value BY <1>2 DEF chosen
<1>4. chosen = {}
  <2>. SUFFICES ASSUME chosen # {} PROVE FALSE
    OBVIOUS
  <2>1. PICK w \in chosen : TRUE BY <2>0
  <2>2. w \in chosen' BY <2>1, <1>1
  <2>3. v # w BY <2>1, <1>2
  <2>4. v = w BY Inv_ChosenSingleton, <2>2, <1>2
  <2>. QED BY <2>3, <2>4
  WHERE <2>0 ASSUME chosen # {} OBVIOUS \* placeholder
<1>5. chosen' = {v}
  <2>. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW w \in chosen', w # v PROVE FALSE
    BY <1>2
  <2>1. w = v BY Inv_ChosenSingleton, <1>2, <2>
  <2>. QED BY <2>1
<1>6. \E v0 \in Value : chosen' = {v0}
  BY <1>3, <1>5
<1>. QED BY <1>4, <1>6 DEF C!Next

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Main refinement theorem

THEOREM Refinement == Spec => C!Spec
PROOF
<1>1. Init => C!Init BY InitChosenEmpty DEF C!Init
<1>2. Inv /\ Inv' /\ [Next]_vars => [C!Next]_chosen BY Refinement_Step
<1>3. Spec => []Inv BY Spec_Inv
<1>4. Spec => [][Next]_vars BY PTL DEF Spec, vars
<1>5. Spec => Init BY PTL DEF Spec
<1>. QED BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, <1>4, <1>5, PTL DEF Spec, C!Spec
=============================================================================

tool_use_result.content:
------------------------------- MODULE Voting_Refinement -------------------------------
EXTENDS FiniteSets, TLAPS, Integers
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value, Acceptor, Quorum

ASSUME QuorumAssumption ==
    /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
    /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VARIABLES votes, maxBal

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteAt(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v) ==
  /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq b
  /\ \E c \in -1..(b-1) :
      /\ (c # -1) => \E a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c, v)
      /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Init ==
    /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
    /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

IncreaseMaxBal(a, b) ==
  /\ b > maxBal[a]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(a, b, v) ==
    /\ maxBal[a] <= b
    /\ \A vt \in votes[a] : vt[1] # b
    /\ \A c \in Acceptor \ {a} :
         \A vt \in votes[c] : (vt[1] = b) => (vt[2] = v)
    /\ \E Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v)
    /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a] = votes[a] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
    /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = b]
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Next ==
    \E a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot :
        \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a, b)
        \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(a, b, v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<votes, maxBal>>
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
ChosenAt(b, v) ==
    \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b, v)}

---------------------------------------------------------------------------

vars == <<votes, maxBal>>

TypeOK == /\ votes \in [Acceptor -> SUBSET (Ballot \X Value)]
          /\ maxBal \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]

CannotVoteAt(a, b) ==
    /\ maxBal[a] > b
    /\ DidNotVoteAt(a, b)

NoneOtherChoosableAt(b, v) ==
    \E Q \in Quorum :
        \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, b)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
    \A c \in 0..(b-1) : NoneOtherChoosableAt(c, v)

VotesSafe ==
    \A a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
        VotedFor(a, b, v) => SafeAt(b, v)

OneValuePerBallot ==
    \A a1, a2 \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v1, v2 \in Value :
        VotedFor(a1, b, v1) /\ VotedFor(a2, b, v2) => (v1 = v2)

Inv == TypeOK /\ VotesSafe /\ OneValuePerBallot

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

LEMMA QuorumNonEmpty == \A Q \in Quorum : Q # {}
  BY QuorumAssumption

LEMMA InitTypeOK == Init => TypeOK
  BY DEF Init, TypeOK, Ballot

LEMMA InitVotesSafe == Init => VotesSafe
  BY DEF Init, VotesSafe, VotedFor

LEMMA InitOneValuePerBallot == Init => OneValuePerBallot
  BY DEF Init, OneValuePerBallot, VotedFor

LEMMA InitInv == Init => Inv
  BY InitTypeOK, InitVotesSafe, InitOneValuePerBallot DEF Inv

LEMMA InitChosenEmpty == Init => chosen = {}
  BY DEF Init, chosen, ChosenAt, VotedFor, Ballot

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Action-level helpers

LEMMA TypeOK_Step ==
  ASSUME TypeOK, [Next]_vars
  PROVE  TypeOK'
PROOF
<1> SUFFICES ASSUME TypeOK,
                    [Next]_vars
             PROVE  TypeOK'
  OBVIOUS
<1>1. CASE UNCHANGED vars
  BY <1>1 DEF TypeOK, vars
<1>2. CASE Next
  <2>1. PICK a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot :
          \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a, b)
          \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(a, b, v)
    BY <1>2 DEF Next
  <2>2. CASE IncreaseMaxBal(a, b)
    <3>1. votes' = votes BY <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
    <3>2. maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = b] BY <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
    <3>3. b \in Ballot \cup {-1} BY DEF Ballot
    <3>4. maxBal' \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]
      BY <3>2, <3>3 DEF TypeOK
    <3>. QED BY <3>1, <3>4 DEF TypeOK
  <2>3. CASE \E v \in Value : VoteFor(a, b, v)
    <3>1. PICK v \in Value : VoteFor(a, b, v) BY <2>3
    <3>2. votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a] = votes[a] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
      BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
    <3>3. maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = b]
      BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
    <3>4. votes[a] \in SUBSET (Ballot \X Value) BY DEF TypeOK
    <3>5. <<b, v>> \in Ballot \X Value BY DEF Ballot
    <3>6. votes[a] \cup {<<b, v>>} \in SUBSET (Ballot \X Value)
      BY <3>4, <3>5
    <3>7. votes' \in [Acceptor -> SUBSET (Ballot \X Value)]
      BY <3>2, <3>6 DEF TypeOK
    <3>8. b \in Ballot \cup {-1} BY DEF Ballot
    <3>9. maxBal' \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]
      BY <3>3, <3>8 DEF TypeOK
    <3>. QED BY <3>7, <3>9 DEF TypeOK
  <2>. QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3
<1>. QED BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Monotonicity of votes

LEMMA Votes_Monotone ==
  ASSUME TypeOK, [Next]_vars,
         NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value,
         VotedFor(a, b, v)
  PROVE  VotedFor(a, b, v)'
PROOF
<1>1. CASE UNCHANGED vars
  BY <1>1 DEF vars, VotedFor
<1>2. CASE Next
  <2>1. PICK a2 \in Acceptor, b2 \in Ballot :
          \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a2, b2)
          \/ \E v2 \in Value : VoteFor(a2, b2, v2)
    BY <1>2 DEF Next
  <2>2. CASE IncreaseMaxBal(a2, b2)
    BY <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal, VotedFor
  <2>3. CASE \E v2 \in Value : VoteFor(a2, b2, v2)
    <3>1. PICK v2 \in Value : VoteFor(a2, b2, v2) BY <2>3
    <3>2. votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a2] = votes[a2] \cup {<<b2, v2>>}]
      BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
    <3>3. <<b, v>> \in votes[a] BY DEF VotedFor
    <3>4. CASE a = a2
      <4>1. votes'[a] = votes[a] \cup {<<b2, v2>>}
        BY <3>2, <3>4 DEF TypeOK
      <4>. QED BY <3>3, <4>1 DEF VotedFor
    <3>5. CASE a # a2
      <4>1. votes'[a] = votes[a]
        BY <3>2, <3>5 DEF TypeOK
      <4>. QED BY <3>3, <4>1 DEF VotedFor
    <3>. QED BY <3>4, <3>5
  <2>. QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3
<1>. QED BY <1>1, <1>2

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Chosen is monotonic

LEMMA Chosen_Monotone ==
  ASSUME TypeOK, [Next]_vars
  PROVE  chosen \subseteq chosen'
PROOF
<1>. SUFFICES ASSUME TypeOK, [Next]_vars,
                     NEW v \in chosen
              PROVE  v \in chosen'
  OBVIOUS
<1>1. v \in Value /\ \E b \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b, v) BY DEF chosen
<1>2. PICK b \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b, v) BY <1>1
<1>3. PICK Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v) BY <1>2 DEF ChosenAt
<1>4. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)'
  <2>. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Q PROVE VotedFor(a, b, v)'
    OBVIOUS
  <2>1. a \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption
  <2>2. VotedFor(a, b, v) BY <1>3
  <2>. QED BY Votes_Monotone, <2>1, <2>2
<1>5. ChosenAt(b, v)' BY <1>4 DEF ChosenAt
<1>. QED BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>5 DEF chosen

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* SafeAt stability

LEMMA SafeAt_Step ==
  ASSUME TypeOK, [Next]_vars,
         NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value,
         SafeAt(b, v)
  PROVE  SafeAt(b, v)'
PROOF
<1>. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW c \in 0..(b-1)
              PROVE  NoneOtherChoosableAt(c, v)'
  BY DEF SafeAt
<1>1. NoneOtherChoosableAt(c, v) BY DEF SafeAt
<1>2. PICK Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, c)
  BY <1>1 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
<1>3. c \in Ballot BY DEF Ballot
<1>4. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c, v)' \/ CannotVoteAt(a, c)'
  <2>. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Q
                PROVE  VotedFor(a, c, v)' \/ CannotVoteAt(a, c)'
    OBVIOUS
  <2>1. a \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption
  <2>2. VotedFor(a, c, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, c) BY <1>2
  <2>3. CASE VotedFor(a, c, v)
    <3>1. VotedFor(a, c, v)' BY <2>1, <1>3, Votes_Monotone, <2>3
    <3>. QED BY <3>1
  <2>4. CASE CannotVoteAt(a, c)
    <3>0. maxBal[a] > c /\ DidNotVoteAt(a, c) BY <2>4 DEF CannotVoteAt
    <3>00. maxBal[a] \in Ballot \cup {-1} BY <2>1 DEF TypeOK
    <3>0a. maxBal[a] \in Int BY <3>00 DEF Ballot
    <3>1. CASE UNCHANGED vars
      <4>1. maxBal[a]' = maxBal[a] BY <3>1 DEF vars
      <4>2. votes[a]' = votes[a] BY <3>1 DEF vars
      <4>3. DidNotVoteAt(a, c)' BY <3>0, <4>2 DEF DidNotVoteAt, VotedFor
      <4>4. maxBal[a]' > c BY <3>0, <4>1
      <4>. QED BY <4>3, <4>4 DEF CannotVoteAt
    <3>2. CASE Next
      <4>1. PICK a2 \in Acceptor, b2 \in Ballot :
              \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a2, b2)
              \/ \E v2 \in Value : VoteFor(a2, b2, v2)
        BY <3>2 DEF Next
      <4>2. CASE IncreaseMaxBal(a2, b2)
        <5>1. votes' = votes BY <4>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
        <5>2. DidNotVoteAt(a, c)'
          BY <3>0, <5>1 DEF DidNotVoteAt, VotedFor
        <5>3. CASE a = a2
          <6>1. maxBal[a2]' = b2 BY <4>2, <5>3 DEF IncreaseMaxBal, TypeOK
          <6>2. maxBal[a]' = b2 BY <5>3, <6>1
          <6>3. b2 \in Ballot BY DEF Ballot
          <6>4. b2 > maxBal[a2] BY <4>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
          <6>5. b2 > maxBal[a] BY <5>3, <6>4
          <6>6. maxBal[a]' > c BY <6>2, <6>5, <3>0, <3>0a, <6>3 DEF Ballot
          <6>. QED BY <5>2, <6>6 DEF CannotVoteAt
        <5>4. CASE a # a2
          <6>1. maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a2] = b2] BY <4>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
          <6>2. maxBal[a]' = maxBal[a] BY <5>4, <6>1 DEF TypeOK
          <6>. QED BY <5>2, <6>2, <3>0 DEF CannotVoteAt
        <5>. QED BY <5>3, <5>4
      <4>3. CASE \E v2 \in Value : VoteFor(a2, b2, v2)
        <5>1. PICK v2 \in Value : VoteFor(a2, b2, v2) BY <4>3
        <5>2. votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a2] = votes[a2] \cup {<<b2, v2>>}]
          BY <5>1 DEF VoteFor
        <5>3. maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a2] = b2]
          BY <5>1 DEF VoteFor
        <5>4. maxBal[a2] <= b2 BY <5>1 DEF VoteFor
        <5>5. CASE a = a2
          <6>1. maxBal[a]' = b2 BY <5>3, <5>5 DEF TypeOK
          <6>2. votes[a]' = votes[a] \cup {<<b2, v2>>} BY <5>2, <5>5 DEF TypeOK
          <6>3. b2 \in Ballot BY DEF Ballot
          <6>4. maxBal[a] <= b2 BY <5>4, <5>5
          \* maxBal[a] > c and maxBal[a] <= b2, so c < b2
          <6>5. c < b2
            <7>1. c < maxBal[a] BY <3>0, <3>0a, <6>3 DEF Ballot
            <7>. QED BY <6>4, <7>1, <3>0a, <6>3 DEF Ballot
          <6>6. b2 > c BY <6>5
          <6>7. maxBal[a]' > c BY <6>1, <6>6
          \* DidNotVoteAt(a, c)' = \A v3 : ~VotedFor(a, c, v3)'
          \* VotedFor(a, c, v3)' = <<c, v3>> \in votes'[a] = votes[a] \cup {<<b2, v2>>}
          \* Since c < b2, <<c, v3>> # <<b2, v2>> (as ballots differ).
          \* So <<c, v3>> \in votes[a] iff <<c, v3>> \in votes[a].
          \* So VotedFor(a, c, v3)' iff VotedFor(a, c, v3), and DidNotVoteAt(a, c) holds.
          <6>8. DidNotVoteAt(a, c)'
            <7>. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW v3 \in Value
                          PROVE  ~ VotedFor(a, c, v3)'
              BY DEF DidNotVoteAt
            <7>1. ~ VotedFor(a, c, v3) BY <3>0 DEF DidNotVoteAt
            <7>2. <<c, v3>> \notin votes[a] BY <7>1 DEF VotedFor
            <7>3. c # b2 BY <6>5
            <7>4. <<c, v3>> # <<b2, v2>> BY <7>3
            <7>5. <<c, v3>> \notin votes[a] \cup {<<b2, v2>>} BY <7>2, <7>4
            <7>6. <<c, v3>> \notin votes'[a] BY <7>5, <6>2
            <7>. QED BY <7>6 DEF VotedFor
          <6>. QED BY <6>7, <6>8 DEF CannotVoteAt
        <5>6. CASE a # a2
          <6>1. maxBal[a]' = maxBal[a] BY <5>3, <5>6 DEF TypeOK
          <6>2. votes[a]' = votes[a] BY <5>2, <5>6 DEF TypeOK
          <6>3. DidNotVoteAt(a, c)' BY <3>0, <6>2 DEF DidNotVoteAt, VotedFor
          <6>. QED BY <6>1, <6>3, <3>0 DEF CannotVoteAt
        <5>. QED BY <5>5, <5>6
      <4>. QED BY <4>1, <4>2, <4>3
    <3>. QED BY <3>1, <3>2 DEF vars
  <2>. QED BY <2>2, <2>3, <2>4
<1>. QED BY <1>4 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* AllSafeAtZero: any value is safe at ballot 0

LEMMA AllSafeAtZero == \A v \in Value : SafeAt(0, v)
PROOF
<1>. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW v \in Value
              PROVE  SafeAt(0, v)
  OBVIOUS
<1>1. 0..(0-1) = {}
  OBVIOUS
<1>. QED BY <1>1 DEF SafeAt

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* ShowsSafety: ShowsSafeAt implies SafeAt under Inv

LEMMA ShowsSafety ==
  ASSUME Inv,
         NEW Q \in Quorum, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value,
         ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v)
  PROVE  SafeAt(b, v)
PROOF
<1>. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW d \in 0..(b-1)
              PROVE  NoneOtherChoosableAt(d, v)
  BY DEF SafeAt
<1>1. PICK c \in -1..(b-1) :
        /\ (c # -1) => \E aa \in Q : VotedFor(aa, c, v)
        /\ \A dd \in (c+1)..(b-1), aa \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(aa, dd)
  BY DEF ShowsSafeAt
<1>2. \A aa \in Q : maxBal[aa] \geq b BY DEF ShowsSafeAt
<1>3. b \in Nat BY DEF Ballot
<1>4. c \in Int /\ c >= -1 /\ c <= b - 1
  BY <1>3
<1>5. d \in Int /\ d >= 0 /\ d <= b - 1
  BY <1>3
<1>6. CASE d = c
  <2>1. c # -1 BY <1>6, <1>5
  <2>2. PICK aa \in Q : VotedFor(aa, c, v) BY <1>1, <2>1
  <2>3. VotedFor(aa, d, v) BY <2>2, <1>6
  <2>4. \E QQ \in Quorum : \A x \in QQ : VotedFor(x, d, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(x, d)
    <3>. WITNESS Q \in Quorum
    <3>1. \A x \in Q : VotedFor(x, d, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(x, d)
      <4>. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW x \in Q
                    PROVE  VotedFor(x, d, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(x, d)
        OBVIOUS
      \* Same Q votes for v at c=d
      <4>1. x \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption
      <4>2. CASE x = aa
        BY <2>3, <4>2
      <4>3. CASE x # aa
        \* The only votes at d=c by quorum members might not be uniform.
        \* But we have OneValuePerBallot: aa votes for v at d, so any other vote at d is for v.
        \* But x may not have voted at d. If not, we need CannotVoteAt(x, d), which requires
        \* maxBal[x] > d and DidNotVoteAt(x, d).
        \* From ShowsSafeAt, maxBal[x] >= b > d, so maxBal[x] > d.
        \* But DidNotVoteAt(x, d) is not given. Hmm.
        \*
        \* Actually for x in Q, x voted for v at c=d (we have \E a in Q : VotedFor(a, c, v),
        \* which gives one aa, but not all). Let me reconsider.
        \*
        \* Looking at the ShowsSafeAt:
        \* /\ \E a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c, v) -- some a in Q voted for v at c
        \* /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d) -- between c+1 and b-1, no Q member voted
        \*
        \* For c = d:
        \* We have aa votes for v at d. Other x in Q may or may not have voted at d.
        \* If x voted at d, by OneValuePerBallot, x voted for v at d, so VotedFor(x, d, v) ✓.
        \* If x didn't vote at d, then DidNotVoteAt(x, d). With maxBal[x] >= b > d, CannotVoteAt(x, d) ✓.
        <4>4. CASE DidNotVoteAt(x, d)
          <5>1. maxBal[x] \geq b BY <1>2
          <5>2. b > d
            <6>1. d \in Nat BY <1>5
            <6>2. b > d
              <7>1. d \in 0..(b-1) BY DEF SafeAt
              <7>. QED BY <1>3
            <6>. QED BY <6>2
          <5>3. maxBal[x] \in Ballot \cup {-1} BY <4>1 DEF TypeOK, Inv
          <5>4. maxBal[x] > d BY <5>1, <5>2, <5>3 DEF Ballot
          <5>. QED BY <5>4, <4>4 DEF CannotVoteAt
        <4>5. CASE ~ DidNotVoteAt(x, d)
          <5>1. \E vv \in Value : VotedFor(x, d, vv) BY <4>5 DEF DidNotVoteAt
          <5>2. PICK vv \in Value : VotedFor(x, d, vv) BY <5>1
          <5>3. VotedFor(aa, d, v) BY <2>3
          <5>4. aa \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption
          <5>5. d \in Ballot BY <1>5 DEF Ballot
          <5>6. vv = v BY <5>2, <5>3, <4>1, <5>4, <5>5 DEF OneValuePerBallot, Inv
          <5>7. VotedFor(x, d, v) BY <5>2, <5>6
          <5>. QED BY <5>7
        <4>. QED BY <4>4, <4>5
      <4>. QED BY <4>2, <4>3
    <3>. QED BY <3>1
  <2>. QED BY <2>4 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
<1>7. CASE d # c
  <2>1. d \in (c+1)..(b-1)
    <3>1. c # -1 => c \in 0..(b-1)
      <4>. SUFFICES ASSUME c # -1 PROVE c \in 0..(b-1)
        OBVIOUS
      <4>. QED BY <1>4
    <3>2. CASE c = -1
      <4>1. d \in 0..(b-1) BY <1>5
      <4>2. c+1 = 0 BY <3>2
      <4>. QED BY <4>1, <4>2
    <3>3. CASE c # -1
      \* c >= 0. d >= 0 and d # c. We need d >= c+1.
      \* Since c was the largest ballot with a vote in Q at v, and d is between 0 and b-1 with d # c,
      \* either d < c or d > c.
      \* Hmm, but if d < c and c # -1, what's the situation? Let me look at the ShowsSafeAt again:
      \* /\ \A d2 \in (c+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d2)
      \* So between c+1 and b-1, no Q member voted. But for ballots < c, we don't have this.
      \*
      \* Hmm. So for d < c (and c >= 0), we need NoneOtherChoosableAt(d, v). But ShowsSafeAt
      \* doesn't directly give us this.
      \*
      \* But wait! Voter aa voted for v at c. By VotesSafe, SafeAt(c, v). So for d < c,
      \* NoneOtherChoosableAt(d, v) follows from SafeAt(c, v).
      \*
      \* So this case requires using VotesSafe of aa's vote.
      <4>1. d \in 0..(b-1) BY <1>5
      <4>2. c \in 0..(b-1) BY <3>1, <3>3
      <4>3. PICK aa \in Q : VotedFor(aa, c, v) BY <1>1, <3>3
      <4>4. aa \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption
      <4>5. c \in Ballot BY <4>2 DEF Ballot
      <4>6. SafeAt(c, v) BY <4>3, <4>4, <4>5 DEF VotesSafe, Inv
      <4>7. CASE d < c
        <5>1. d \in 0..(c-1)
          BY <4>1, <4>2, <4>7
        <5>2. NoneOtherChoosableAt(d, v) BY <5>1, <4>6 DEF SafeAt
        <5>. QED BY <5>2
      <4>8. CASE d > c
        <5>1. d >= c + 1 BY <4>8, <1>5, <4>2
        <5>2. d \in (c+1)..(b-1) BY <5>1, <4>1
        <5>. QED BY <5>2
      <4>9. CASE d = c
        BY <4>9, <1>7
      <4>. QED BY <4>7, <4>8, <4>9
    <3>. QED BY <3>2, <3>3
  <2>2. \A aa \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(aa, d) BY <2>1, <1>1
  <2>3. \E QQ \in Quorum : \A aa \in QQ : VotedFor(aa, d, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(aa, d)
    <3>. WITNESS Q \in Quorum
    <3>1. \A aa \in Q : VotedFor(aa, d, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(aa, d)
      <4>. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW aa \in Q
                    PROVE  VotedFor(aa, d, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(aa, d)
        OBVIOUS
      <4>1. aa \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption
      <4>2. DidNotVoteAt(aa, d) BY <2>2
      <4>3. maxBal[aa] \geq b BY <1>2
      <4>4. b > d
        <5>1. d \in Nat BY <1>5
        <5>2. d \in 0..(b-1) BY DEF SafeAt
        <5>3. b > d BY <5>1, <5>2, <1>3
        <5>. QED BY <5>3
      <4>5. maxBal[aa] \in Ballot \cup {-1} BY <4>1 DEF TypeOK, Inv
      <4>6. maxBal[aa] > d BY <4>3, <4>4, <4>5 DEF Ballot
      <4>7. CannotVoteAt(aa, d) BY <4>2, <4>6 DEF CannotVoteAt
      <4>. QED BY <4>7
    <3>. QED BY <3>1
  <2>. QED BY <2>3 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
<1>. QED BY <1>6, <1>7

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* OneValuePerBallot preservation

LEMMA OneValuePerBallot_Step ==
  ASSUME Inv, [Next]_vars
  PROVE  OneValuePerBallot'
PROOF
<1>. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a1 \in Acceptor, NEW a2 \in Acceptor,
                     NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v1 \in Value, NEW v2 \in Value,
                     VotedFor(a1, b, v1)', VotedFor(a2, b, v2)'
              PROVE  v1 = v2
  BY DEF OneValuePerBallot
<1>1. CASE UNCHANGED vars
  <2>1. votes' = votes BY <1>1 DEF vars
  <2>2. VotedFor(a1, b, v1) BY <2>1 DEF VotedFor
  <2>3. VotedFor(a2, b, v2) BY <2>1 DEF VotedFor
  <2>. QED BY <2>2, <2>3 DEF OneValuePerBallot, Inv
<1>2. CASE Next
  <2>1. PICK a3 \in Acceptor, b3 \in Ballot :
          \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a3, b3)
          \/ \E v3 \in Value : VoteFor(a3, b3, v3)
    BY <1>2 DEF Next
  <2>2. CASE IncreaseMaxBal(a3, b3)
    <3>1. votes' = votes BY <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
    <3>2. VotedFor(a1, b, v1) BY <3>1 DEF VotedFor
    <3>3. VotedFor(a2, b, v2) BY <3>1 DEF VotedFor
    <3>. QED BY <3>2, <3>3 DEF OneValuePerBallot, Inv
  <2>3. CASE \E v3 \in Value : VoteFor(a3, b3, v3)
    <3>1. PICK v3 \in Value : VoteFor(a3, b3, v3) BY <2>3
    <3>2. votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a3] = votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>}]
      BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
    <3>3. \A vt \in votes[a3] : vt[1] # b3 BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
    <3>4. \A c \in Acceptor \ {a3} : \A vt \in votes[c] : vt[1] = b3 => vt[2] = v3
      BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
    <3>5. votes'[a3] = votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>}
      BY <3>2 DEF TypeOK, Inv
    <3>6. \A x \in Acceptor \ {a3} : votes'[x] = votes[x]
      BY <3>2 DEF TypeOK, Inv
    \* Now analyze a1 and a2.
    \* VotedFor(a1, b, v1)' means <<b, v1>> \in votes'[a1].
    \* If a1 = a3, then votes'[a3] = votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>}. So <<b, v1>> \in votes[a3] or <<b, v1>> = <<b3, v3>>.
    \* Similarly for a2.
    <3>7. CASE a1 = a3 /\ a2 = a3
      <4>1. <<b, v1>> \in votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>} BY <3>5, <3>7 DEF VotedFor
      <4>2. <<b, v2>> \in votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>} BY <3>5, <3>7 DEF VotedFor
      <4>3. CASE <<b, v1>> = <<b3, v3>> /\ <<b, v2>> = <<b3, v3>>
        BY <4>3
      <4>4. CASE <<b, v1>> = <<b3, v3>> /\ <<b, v2>> \in votes[a3]
        <5>1. b = b3 BY <4>4
        <5>2. v1 = v3 BY <4>4
        <5>3. <<b, v2>> \in votes[a3] /\ (<<b, v2>>)[1] = b BY <4>4
        <5>4. \E vt \in votes[a3] : vt[1] = b3 BY <5>1, <5>3
        <5>5. FALSE BY <5>4, <3>3, <5>1
        <5>. QED BY <5>5
      <4>5. CASE <<b, v1>> \in votes[a3] /\ <<b, v2>> = <<b3, v3>>
        <5>1. b = b3 BY <4>5
        <5>2. <<b, v1>> \in votes[a3] /\ (<<b, v1>>)[1] = b BY <4>5
        <5>3. FALSE BY <5>2, <3>3, <5>1
        <5>. QED BY <5>3
      <4>6. CASE <<b, v1>> \in votes[a3] /\ <<b, v2>> \in votes[a3]
        <5>1. VotedFor(a3, b, v1) BY <4>6 DEF VotedFor
        <5>2. VotedFor(a3, b, v2) BY <4>6 DEF VotedFor
        <5>. QED BY <5>1, <5>2 DEF OneValuePerBallot, Inv
      <4>. QED BY <4>1, <4>2, <4>3, <4>4, <4>5, <4>6
    <3>8. CASE a1 = a3 /\ a2 # a3
      <4>1. <<b, v1>> \in votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>} BY <3>5, <3>8 DEF VotedFor
      <4>2. votes'[a2] = votes[a2] BY <3>6, <3>8
      <4>3. <<b, v2>> \in votes[a2] BY <4>2 DEF VotedFor
      <4>4. VotedFor(a2, b, v2) BY <4>3 DEF VotedFor
      <4>5. CASE <<b, v1>> = <<b3, v3>>
        <5>1. b = b3 BY <4>5
        <5>2. v1 = v3 BY <4>5
        <5>3. (<<b, v2>>)[1] = b3 BY <5>1
        <5>4. (<<b, v2>>)[2] = v3 BY <3>4, <4>3, <3>8, <5>3
        <5>5. v2 = v3 BY <5>4
        <5>. QED BY <5>2, <5>5
      <4>6. CASE <<b, v1>> \in votes[a3]
        <5>1. VotedFor(a3, b, v1) BY <4>6 DEF VotedFor
        <5>. QED BY <5>1, <4>4 DEF OneValuePerBallot, Inv
      <4>. QED BY <4>1, <4>5, <4>6
    <3>9. CASE a1 # a3 /\ a2 = a3
      <4>1. <<b, v2>> \in votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>} BY <3>5, <3>9 DEF VotedFor
      <4>2. votes'[a1] = votes[a1] BY <3>6, <3>9
      <4>3. <<b, v1>> \in votes[a1] BY <4>2 DEF VotedFor
      <4>4. VotedFor(a1, b, v1) BY <4>3 DEF VotedFor
      <4>5. CASE <<b, v2>> = <<b3, v3>>
        <5>1. b = b3 BY <4>5
        <5>2. v2 = v3 BY <4>5
        <5>3. (<<b, v1>>)[1] = b3 BY <5>1
        <5>4. (<<b, v1>>)[2] = v3 BY <3>4, <4>3, <3>9, <5>3
        <5>5. v1 = v3 BY <5>4
        <5>. QED BY <5>2, <5>5
      <4>6. CASE <<b, v2>> \in votes[a3]
        <5>1. VotedFor(a3, b, v2) BY <4>6 DEF VotedFor
        <5>. QED BY <5>1, <4>4 DEF OneValuePerBallot, Inv
      <4>. QED BY <4>1, <4>5, <4>6
    <3>10. CASE a1 # a3 /\ a2 # a3
      <4>1. votes'[a1] = votes[a1] BY <3>6, <3>10
      <4>2. votes'[a2] = votes[a2] BY <3>6, <3>10
      <4>3. VotedFor(a1, b, v1) BY <4>1 DEF VotedFor
      <4>4. VotedFor(a2, b, v2) BY <4>2 DEF VotedFor
      <4>. QED BY <4>3, <4>4 DEF OneValuePerBallot, Inv
    <3>. QED BY <3>7, <3>8, <3>9, <3>10
  <2>. QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3
<1>. QED BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* VotesSafe preservation

LEMMA VotesSafe_Step ==
  ASSUME Inv, [Next]_vars
  PROVE  VotesSafe'
PROOF
<1>. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value,
                     VotedFor(a, b, v)'
              PROVE  SafeAt(b, v)'
  BY DEF VotesSafe
<1>1. CASE UNCHANGED vars
  <2>1. votes' = votes BY <1>1 DEF vars
  <2>2. VotedFor(a, b, v) BY <2>1 DEF VotedFor
  <2>3. SafeAt(b, v) BY <2>2 DEF VotesSafe, Inv
  <2>4. TypeOK BY DEF Inv
  <2>. QED BY <2>3, <2>4, <1>1, SafeAt_Step
<1>2. CASE Next
  <2>1. PICK a3 \in Acceptor, b3 \in Ballot :
          \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a3, b3)
          \/ \E v3 \in Value : VoteFor(a3, b3, v3)
    BY <1>2 DEF Next
  <2>2. CASE IncreaseMaxBal(a3, b3)
    <3>1. votes' = votes BY <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
    <3>2. VotedFor(a, b, v) BY <3>1 DEF VotedFor
    <3>3. SafeAt(b, v) BY <3>2 DEF VotesSafe, Inv
    <3>4. TypeOK BY DEF Inv
    <3>5. [Next]_vars BY <1>2
    <3>. QED BY <3>3, <3>4, <3>5, SafeAt_Step
  <2>3. CASE \E v3 \in Value : VoteFor(a3, b3, v3)
    <3>1. PICK v3 \in Value : VoteFor(a3, b3, v3) BY <2>3
    <3>2. votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a3] = votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>}]
      BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
    <3>3. \E Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, b3, v3) BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
    <3>4. votes'[a3] = votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>}
      BY <3>2 DEF TypeOK, Inv
    <3>5. \A x \in Acceptor \ {a3} : votes'[x] = votes[x]
      BY <3>2 DEF TypeOK, Inv
    <3>6. CASE a = a3
      <4>1. <<b, v>> \in votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>} BY <3>4, <3>6 DEF VotedFor
      <4>2. CASE <<b, v>> = <<b3, v3>>
        <5>1. b = b3 BY <4>2
        <5>2. v = v3 BY <4>2
        <5>3. PICK Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, b3, v3) BY <3>3
        <5>4. SafeAt(b3, v3) BY <5>3, ShowsSafety
        <5>5. SafeAt(b, v) BY <5>1, <5>2, <5>4
        <5>6. TypeOK BY DEF Inv
        <5>. QED BY <5>5, <5>6, <1>2, SafeAt_Step
      <4>3. CASE <<b, v>> \in votes[a3]
        <5>1. VotedFor(a3, b, v) BY <4>3 DEF VotedFor
        <5>2. SafeAt(b, v) BY <5>1 DEF VotesSafe, Inv
        <5>3. TypeOK BY DEF Inv
        <5>. QED BY <5>2, <5>3, <1>2, SafeAt_Step
      <4>. QED BY <4>1, <4>2, <4>3
    <3>7. CASE a # a3
      <4>1. votes'[a] = votes[a] BY <3>5, <3>7
      <4>2. <<b, v>> \in votes[a] BY <4>1 DEF VotedFor
      <4>3. VotedFor(a, b, v) BY <4>2 DEF VotedFor
      <4>4. SafeAt(b, v) BY <4>3 DEF VotesSafe, Inv
      <4>5. TypeOK BY DEF Inv
      <4>. QED BY <4>4, <4>5, <1>2, SafeAt_Step
    <3>. QED BY <3>6, <3>7
  <2>. QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3
<1>. QED BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Inv is preserved by Next

LEMMA Inv_Step ==
  ASSUME Inv, [Next]_vars
  PROVE  Inv'
PROOF
<1>1. TypeOK BY DEF Inv
<1>2. TypeOK' BY <1>1, TypeOK_Step
<1>3. VotesSafe' BY VotesSafe_Step
<1>4. OneValuePerBallot' BY OneValuePerBallot_Step
<1>. QED BY <1>2, <1>3, <1>4 DEF Inv

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Spec implies always Inv

LEMMA Spec_Inv == Spec => []Inv
PROOF
<1>1. Init => Inv BY InitInv
<1>2. Inv /\ [Next]_vars => Inv' BY Inv_Step
<1>. QED BY <1>1, <1>2, PTL DEF Spec, vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* OneVote follows from OneValuePerBallot

LEMMA OneVote_Lemma ==
  ASSUME Inv,
         NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW b \in Ballot,
         NEW v \in Value, NEW w \in Value,
         VotedFor(a, b, v), VotedFor(a, b, w)
  PROVE  v = w
PROOF
  BY DEF OneValuePerBallot, Inv

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Under Inv, chosen has at most one element

LEMMA Inv_ChosenSingleton ==
  ASSUME Inv,
         NEW v1 \in chosen, NEW v2 \in chosen
  PROVE  v1 = v2
PROOF
<1>1. v1 \in Value /\ v2 \in Value BY DEF chosen
<1>2. PICK b1 \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b1, v1) BY DEF chosen
<1>3. PICK b2 \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b2, v2) BY DEF chosen
<1>4. PICK Q1 \in Quorum : \A a \in Q1 : VotedFor(a, b1, v1) BY <1>2 DEF ChosenAt
<1>5. PICK Q2 \in Quorum : \A a \in Q2 : VotedFor(a, b2, v2) BY <1>3 DEF ChosenAt
<1>6. CASE b1 = b2
  <2>1. PICK a \in Q1 \cap Q2 : TRUE BY QuorumAssumption
  <2>2. VotedFor(a, b1, v1) BY <1>4, <2>1
  <2>3. VotedFor(a, b2, v2) BY <1>5, <2>1
  <2>4. VotedFor(a, b1, v2) BY <2>3, <1>6
  <2>5. a \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption, <2>1
  <2>. QED BY <2>2, <2>4, <2>5, OneVote_Lemma, <1>1
<1>7. CASE b1 # b2
  <2>1. CASE b1 < b2
    \* SafeAt(b2, v2) and at ballot b1, NoneOtherChoosableAt(b1, v2) (since b1 < b2).
    \* But quorum Q1 voted for v1 at b1, so NoneOtherChoosableAt(b1, v2) requires
    \* some Q' such that all in Q' have VotedFor(_, b1, v2) or CannotVoteAt(_, b1).
    \* Q' \cap Q1 has some element a. VotedFor(a, b1, v1) and a \in Q' has either VotedFor(a, b1, v2) or CannotVoteAt(a, b1).
    \* If VotedFor(a, b1, v2), then by OneVote, v1 = v2 (contradicts v1 # v2). But wait, v1 might = v2.
    \* If CannotVoteAt(a, b1), then DidNotVoteAt(a, b1), contradicts VotedFor(a, b1, v1).
    \* So in both cases, either v1 = v2 (which is what we want) or contradiction.
    <3>1. PICK a \in Q2 : VotedFor(a, b2, v2) BY <1>5, QuorumNonEmpty
    <3>2. a \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption
    <3>3. SafeAt(b2, v2) BY <3>1, <3>2 DEF VotesSafe, Inv
    <3>4. b1 \in 0..(b2 - 1) BY <2>1 DEF Ballot
    <3>5. NoneOtherChoosableAt(b1, v2) BY <3>3, <3>4 DEF SafeAt
    <3>6. PICK Q3 \in Quorum :
           \A a3 \in Q3 : VotedFor(a3, b1, v2) \/ CannotVoteAt(a3, b1)
      BY <3>5 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
    <3>7. PICK x \in Q1 \cap Q3 : TRUE BY QuorumAssumption
    <3>8. x \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption, <3>7
    <3>9. VotedFor(x, b1, v1) BY <1>4, <3>7
    <3>10. VotedFor(x, b1, v2) \/ CannotVoteAt(x, b1) BY <3>6, <3>7
    <3>11. ~ CannotVoteAt(x, b1)
      <4>1. ~ DidNotVoteAt(x, b1)
        <5>1. ASSUME DidNotVoteAt(x, b1) PROVE FALSE
          <6>1. ~ VotedFor(x, b1, v1) BY <5>1 DEF DidNotVoteAt
          <6>. QED BY <6>1, <3>9
        <5>. QED BY <5>1
      <4>. QED BY <4>1 DEF CannotVoteAt
    <3>12. VotedFor(x, b1, v2) BY <3>10, <3>11
    <3>. QED BY <3>9, <3>12, <3>8, OneVote_Lemma, <1>1
  <2>2. CASE b2 < b1
    <3>1. PICK a \in Q1 : VotedFor(a, b1, v1) BY <1>4, QuorumNonEmpty
    <3>2. a \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption
    <3>3. SafeAt(b1, v1) BY <3>1, <3>2 DEF VotesSafe, Inv
    <3>4. b2 \in 0..(b1 - 1) BY <2>2 DEF Ballot
    <3>5. NoneOtherChoosableAt(b2, v1) BY <3>3, <3>4 DEF SafeAt
    <3>6. PICK Q3 \in Quorum :
           \A a3 \in Q3 : VotedFor(a3, b2, v1) \/ CannotVoteAt(a3, b2)
      BY <3>5 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
    <3>7. PICK x \in Q2 \cap Q3 : TRUE BY QuorumAssumption
    <3>8. x \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption, <3>7
    <3>9. VotedFor(x, b2, v2) BY <1>5, <3>7
    <3>10. VotedFor(x, b2, v1) \/ CannotVoteAt(x, b2) BY <3>6, <3>7
    <3>11. ~ CannotVoteAt(x, b2)
      <4>1. ~ DidNotVoteAt(x, b2)
        <5>1. ASSUME DidNotVoteAt(x, b2) PROVE FALSE
          <6>1. ~ VotedFor(x, b2, v2) BY <5>1 DEF DidNotVoteAt
          <6>. QED BY <6>1, <3>9
        <5>. QED BY <5>1
      <4>. QED BY <4>1 DEF CannotVoteAt
    <3>12. VotedFor(x, b2, v1) BY <3>10, <3>11
    <3>. QED BY <3>9, <3>12, <3>8, OneVote_Lemma, <1>1
  <2>. QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <1>7 DEF Ballot
<1>. QED BY <1>6, <1>7

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Refinement step

LEMMA Refinement_Step ==
  ASSUME Inv, Inv', [Next]_vars
  PROVE  [C!Next]_chosen
PROOF
<1>. SUFFICES ASSUME chosen' # chosen
              PROVE  C!Next
  BY DEF C!Next
<1>1. chosen \subseteq chosen' BY Chosen_Monotone DEF Inv
<1>2. PICK v \in chosen' \ chosen : TRUE
  <2>1. chosen' \ chosen # {}
    <3>1. chosen' # chosen BY DEF chosen
    <3>. QED BY <3>1, <1>1
  <2>. QED BY <2>1
<1>3. v \in Value BY <1>2 DEF chosen
<1>4. chosen = {}
  <2>. SUFFICES ASSUME chosen # {} PROVE FALSE
    OBVIOUS
  <2>1. PICK w \in chosen : TRUE BY <2>0
  <2>2. w \in chosen' BY <2>1, <1>1
  <2>3. v # w BY <2>1, <1>2
  <2>4. v = w BY Inv_ChosenSingleton, <2>2, <1>2
  <2>. QED BY <2>3, <2>4
  WHERE <2>0 ASSUME chosen # {} OBVIOUS \* placeholder
<1>5. chosen' = {v}
  <2>. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW w \in chosen', w # v PROVE FALSE
    BY <1>2
  <2>1. w = v BY Inv_ChosenSingleton, <1>2, <2>
  <2>. QED BY <2>1
<1>6. \E v0 \in Value : chosen' = {v0}
  BY <1>3, <1>5
<1>. QED BY <1>4, <1>6 DEF C!Next

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Main refinement theorem

THEOREM Refinement == Spec => C!Spec
PROOF
<1>1. Init => C!Init BY InitChosenEmpty DEF C!Init
<1>2. Inv /\ Inv' /\ [Next]_vars => [C!Next]_chosen BY Refinement_Step
<1>3. Spec => []Inv BY Spec_Inv
<1>4. Spec => [][Next]_vars BY PTL DEF Spec, vars
<1>5. Spec => Init BY PTL DEF Spec
<1>. QED BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, <1>4, <1>5, PTL DEF Spec, C!Spec

+  <2>3. \E QQ \in Quorum : \A aa \in QQ : VotedFor(aa, d, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(aa, d)
+    <3>1. \A aa \in Q : VotedFor(aa, d, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(aa, d)
+                    PROVE  VotedFor(aa, d, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(aa, d)
+      <4>5. maxBal[aa] \in Ballot \cup {-1} BY <4>1 DEF TypeOK, Inv
+<1>. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a1 \in Acceptor, NEW a2 \in Acceptor,
+                     NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v1 \in Value, NEW v2 \in Value,
+                     VotedFor(a1, b, v1)', VotedFor(a2, b, v2)'
+  <2>2. VotedFor(a1, b, v1) BY <2>1 DEF VotedFor
+  <2>3. VotedFor(a2, b, v2) BY <2>1 DEF VotedFor
+    <3>2. VotedFor(a1, b, v1) BY <3>1 DEF VotedFor
+    <3>3. VotedFor(a2, b, v2) BY <3>1 DEF VotedFor
+  <2>3. CASE \E v3 \in Value : VoteFor(a3, b3, v3)
+    <3>1. PICK v3 \in Value : VoteFor(a3, b3, v3) BY <2>3
+    <3>3. \A vt \in votes[a3] : vt[1] # b3 BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
+    <3>4. \A c \in Acceptor \ {a3} : \A vt \in votes[c] : vt[1] = b3 => vt[2] = v3
+    \* VotedFor(a1, b, v1)' means <<b, v1>> \in votes'[a1].
+    \* If a1 = a3, then votes'[a3] = votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>}. So <<b, v1>> \in votes[a3] or <<b, v1>> = <<b3, v3>>.
+      <4>1. <<b, v1>> \in votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>} BY <3>5, <3>7 DEF VotedFor
+      <4>2. <<b, v2>> \in votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>} BY <3>5, <3>7 DEF VotedFor
+        <5>1. VotedFor(a3, b, v1) BY <4>6 DEF VotedFor
+        <5>2. VotedFor(a3, b, v2) BY <4>6 DEF VotedFor
+      <4>1. <<b, v1>> \in votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>} BY <3>5, <3>8 DEF VotedFor
+      <4>4. VotedFor(a2, b, v2) BY <4>3 DEF VotedFor
+        <5>1. VotedFor(a3, b, v1) BY <4>6 DEF VotedFor
+      <4>1. <<b, v2>> \in votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>} BY <3>5, <3>9 DEF VotedFor
+      <4>4. VotedFor(a1, b, v1) BY <4>3 DEF VotedFor
+        <5>1. VotedFor(a3, b, v2) BY <4>6 DEF VotedFor
+      <4>3. VotedFor(a1, b, v1) BY <4>1 DEF VotedFor
+      <4>4. VotedFor(a2, b, v2) BY <4>2 DEF VotedFor
+<1>. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value,
+  <2>2. VotedFor(a, b, v) BY <2>1 DEF VotedFor
+  <2>3. SafeAt(b, v) BY <2>2 DEF VotesSafe, Inv
+    <3>2. VotedFor(a, b, v) BY <3>1 DEF VotedFor
+    <3>3. SafeAt(b, v) BY <3>2 DEF VotesSafe, Inv
+  <2>3. CASE \E v3 \in Value : VoteFor(a3, b3, v3)
+    <3>1. PICK v3 \in Value : VoteFor(a3, b3, v3) BY <2>3
+    <3>3. \E Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, b3, v3) BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
+      <4>1. <<b, v>> \in votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>} BY <3>4, <3>6 DEF VotedFor
+        <5>3. PICK Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, b3, v3) BY <3>3
+        <5>1. VotedFor(a3, b, v) BY <4>3 DEF VotedFor
+        <5>2. SafeAt(b, v) BY <5>1 DEF VotesSafe, Inv
+      <4>3. VotedFor(a, b, v) BY <4>2 DEF VotedFor
+      <4>4. SafeAt(b, v) BY <4>3 DEF VotesSafe, Inv
+<1>. QED BY <1>1, <1>2, PTL DEF Spec, vars
+         NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW b \in Ballot,
+         NEW v \in Value, NEW w \in Value,
+         VotedFor(a, b, v), VotedFor(a, b, w)
+\* Under Inv, chosen has at most one element
+         NEW v1 \in chosen, NEW v2 \in chosen
+<1>1. v1 \in Value /\ v2 \in Value BY DEF chosen
+<1>2. PICK b1 \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b1, v1) BY DEF chosen
+<1>3. PICK b2 \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b2, v2) BY DEF chosen
+<1>4. PICK Q1 \in Quorum : \A a \in Q1 : VotedFor(a, b1, v1) BY <1>2 DEF ChosenAt
+<1>5. PICK Q2 \in Quorum : \A a \in Q2 : VotedFor(a, b2, v2) BY <1>3 DEF ChosenAt
+  <2>1. PICK a \in Q1 \cap Q2 : TRUE BY QuorumAssumption
+    \* SafeAt(b2, v2) and at ballot b1, NoneOtherChoosableAt(b1, v2) (since b1 < b2).
+    \* But quorum Q1 voted for v1 at b1, so NoneOtherChoosableAt(b1, v2) requires
+    \* some Q' such that all in Q' have VotedFor(_, b1, v2) or CannotVoteAt(_, b1).
+    \* Q' \cap Q1 has some element a. VotedFor(a, b1, v1) and a \in Q' has either VotedFor(a, b1, v2) or CannotVoteAt(a, b1).
+    \* If VotedFor(a, b1, v2), then by OneVote, v1 = v2 (contradicts v1 # v2). But wait, v1 might = v2.
+    \* If CannotVoteAt(a, b1), then DidNotVoteAt(a, b1), contradicts VotedFor(a, b1, v1).
+    \* So in both cases, either v1 = v2 (which is what we want) or contradiction.
+    <3>1. PICK a \in Q2 : VotedFor(a, b2, v2) BY <1>5, QuorumNonEmpty
+    <3>3. SafeAt(b2, v2) BY <3>1, <3>2 DEF VotesSafe, Inv
+           \A a3 \in Q3 : VotedFor(a3, b1, v2) \/ CannotVoteAt(a3, b1)
+    <3>7. PICK x \in Q1 \cap Q3 : TRUE BY QuorumAssumption
+    <3>10. VotedFor(x, b1, v2) \/ CannotVoteAt(x, b1) BY <3>6, <3>7
+          <6>1. ~ VotedFor(x, b1, v1) BY <5>1 DEF DidNotVoteAt
+    <3>1. PICK a \in Q1 : VotedFor(a, b1, v1) BY <1>4, QuorumNonEmpty
+    <3>3. SafeAt(b1, v1) BY <3>1, <3>2 DEF VotesSafe, Inv
+           \A a3 \in Q3 : VotedFor(a3, b2, v1) \/ CannotVoteAt(a3, b2)
+    <3>7. PICK x \in Q2 \cap Q3 : TRUE BY QuorumAssumption
+    <3>10. VotedFor(x, b2, v1) \/ CannotVoteAt(x, b2) BY <3>6, <3>7
+          <6>1. ~ VotedFor(x, b2, v2) BY <5>1 DEF DidNotVoteAt
+<1>1. chosen \subseteq chosen' BY Chosen_Monotone DEF Inv
+  <2>. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW w \in chosen', w # v PROVE FALSE
+<1>1. Init => C!Init BY InitChosenEmpty DEF C!Init
+<1>4. Spec => [][Next]_vars BY PTL DEF Spec, vars
+<1>5. Spec => Init BY PTL DEF Spec

tool_use_result.originalFile:
------------------------------- MODULE Voting_Refinement -------------------------------
EXTENDS FiniteSets, TLAPS, Integers
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value, Acceptor, Quorum

ASSUME QuorumAssumption ==
    /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
    /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VARIABLES votes, maxBal

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteAt(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v) ==
  /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq b
  /\ \E c \in -1..(b-1) :
      /\ (c # -1) => \E a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c, v)
      /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Init ==
    /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
    /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

IncreaseMaxBal(a, b) ==
  /\ b > maxBal[a]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(a, b, v) ==
    /\ maxBal[a] <= b
    /\ \A vt \in votes[a] : vt[1] # b
    /\ \A c \in Acceptor \ {a} :
         \A vt \in votes[c] : (vt[1] = b) => (vt[2] = v)
    /\ \E Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v)
    /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a] = votes[a] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
    /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = b]
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Next ==
    \E a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot :
        \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a, b)
        \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(a, b, v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<votes, maxBal>>
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
ChosenAt(b, v) ==
    \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b, v)}

---------------------------------------------------------------------------

V == INSTANCE Voting

C == INSTANCE Consensus

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

LEMMA InitEq == Init <=> V!Init
  BY DEF Init, V!Init

LEMMA BallotEq == Ballot = V!Ballot
  BY DEF Ballot, V!Ballot

LEMMA NextEq == Next <=> V!Next
  BY BallotEq DEF Next, V!Next, IncreaseMaxBal, V!IncreaseMaxBal,
                  VoteFor, V!VoteFor,
                  ShowsSafeAt, V!ShowsSafeAt,
                  VotedFor, V!VotedFor,
                  DidNotVoteAt, V!DidNotVoteAt

LEMMA ChosenEq == chosen = V!chosen
  BY BallotEq DEF chosen, V!chosen, ChosenAt, V!ChosenAt, VotedFor, V!VotedFor

LEMMA SquareNextEq == [Next]_<<votes, maxBal>> <=> [V!Next]_<<votes, maxBal>>
  BY NextEq

LEMMA SpecEq == Spec <=> V!Spec
<1>1. Init <=> V!Init BY InitEq
<1>2. [][Next]_<<votes, maxBal>> <=> [][V!Next]_<<votes, maxBal>>
    BY SquareNextEq, PTL
<1>. QED BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF Spec, V!Spec

LEMMA CSquareNextEq == [C!Next]_chosen <=> [V!C!Next]_V!chosen
  BY BallotEq DEF C!Next, V!C!Next, chosen, V!chosen, ChosenAt, V!ChosenAt, VotedFor, V!VotedFor

LEMMA CSpecEq == C!Spec <=> V!C!Spec
<1>1. C!Init <=> V!C!Init BY ChosenEq DEF C!Init, V!C!Init
<1>2. [][C!Next]_chosen <=> [][V!C!Next]_V!chosen
    BY CSquareNextEq, PTL
<1>. QED BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF C!Spec, V!C!Spec

THEOREM Refinement == Spec => C!Spec
  PROOF
  <1>. SUFFICES ASSUME Spec PROVE C!Spec
    OBVIOUS
  <1>1. V!Spec BY SpecEq, PTL
  <1>2. V!C!Spec BY <1>1, V!Refinement DEF V!Refinement
  <1>. QED BY <1>2, CSpecEq, PTL
=============================================================================

321	  OBVIOUS

324	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
325	\* ShowsSafety: ShowsSafeAt implies SafeAt under Inv
326	
327	LEMMA ShowsSafety ==
328	  ASSUME Inv,
329	         NEW Q \in Quorum, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value,
330	         ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v)
331	  PROVE  SafeAt(b, v)
332	PROOF
333	<1>. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW d \in 0..(b-1)
334	              PROVE  NoneOtherChoosableAt(d, v)
335	  BY DEF SafeAt
336	<1>1. PICK c \in -1..(b-1) :
337	        /\ (c # -1) => \E aa \in Q : VotedFor(aa, c, v)
338	        /\ \A dd \in (c+1)..(b-1), aa \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(aa, dd)
339	  BY DEF ShowsSafeAt
340	<1>2. \A aa \in Q : maxBal[aa] \geq b BY DEF ShowsSafeAt
341	<1>3. b \in Nat BY DEF Ballot
342	<1>4. c \in Int /\ c >= -1 /\ c <= b - 1
343	  BY <1>3
344	<1>5. d \in Int /\ d >= 0 /\ d <= b - 1
345	  BY <1>3
346	<1>6. CASE d = c
347	  <2>1. c # -1 BY <1>6, <1>5
348	  <2>2. PICK aa \in Q : VotedFor(aa, c, v) BY <1>1, <2>1
349	  <2>3. VotedFor(aa, d, v) BY <2>2, <1>6

file.content:
<1>1. 0..(0-1) = {}
  OBVIOUS
<1>. QED BY <1>1 DEF SafeAt

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* ShowsSafety: ShowsSafeAt implies SafeAt under Inv

LEMMA ShowsSafety ==
  ASSUME Inv,
         NEW Q \in Quorum, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value,
         ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v)
  PROVE  SafeAt(b, v)
PROOF
<1>. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW d \in 0..(b-1)
              PROVE  NoneOtherChoosableAt(d, v)
  BY DEF SafeAt
<1>1. PICK c \in -1..(b-1) :
        /\ (c # -1) => \E aa \in Q : VotedFor(aa, c, v)
        /\ \A dd \in (c+1)..(b-1), aa \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(aa, dd)
  BY DEF ShowsSafeAt
<1>2. \A aa \in Q : maxBal[aa] \geq b BY DEF ShowsSafeAt
<1>3. b \in Nat BY DEF Ballot
<1>4. c \in Int /\ c >= -1 /\ c <= b - 1
  BY <1>3
<1>5. d \in Int /\ d >= 0 /\ d <= b - 1
  BY <1>3
<1>6. CASE d = c
  <2>1. c # -1 BY <1>6, <1>5
  <2>2. PICK aa \in Q : VotedFor(aa, c, v) BY <1>1, <2>1
  <2>3. VotedFor(aa, d, v) BY <2>2, <1>6
