content.text: Let me reformat the ShowsSafety proof structure to avoid potential parser issues with multiple `<1>.` labels:

content.content:
100	
101	LEMMA InitInv == Init => Inv
102	  BY InitTypeOK, InitVotesSafe, InitOneValuePerBallot DEF Inv
103	
104	LEMMA InitChosenEmpty == Init => chosen = {}
105	  BY DEF Init, chosen, ChosenAt, VotedFor, Ballot
106	
107	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
108	\* Action-level helpers
109	
110	LEMMA TypeOK_Step ==
111	  ASSUME TypeOK, [Next]_vars
112	  PROVE  TypeOK'
113	PROOF
114	<1> SUFFICES ASSUME TypeOK,
115	                    [Next]_vars
116	             PROVE  TypeOK'
117	  OBVIOUS
118	<1>1. CASE UNCHANGED vars
119	  BY <1>1 DEF TypeOK, vars
120	<1>2. CASE Next
121	  <2>1. PICK a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot :
122	          \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a, b)
123	          \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(a, b, v)
124	    BY <1>2 DEF Next
125	  <2>2. CASE IncreaseMaxBal(a, b)
126	    <3>1. votes' = votes BY <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
127	    <3>2. maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = b] BY <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
128	    <3>3. b \in Ballot \cup {-1} BY DEF Ballot
129	    <3>4. maxBal' \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]
130	      BY <3>2, <3>3 DEF TypeOK
131	    <3>. QED BY <3>1, <3>4 DEF TypeOK
132	  <2>3. CASE \E v \in Value : VoteFor(a, b, v)
133	    <3>1. PICK v \in Value : VoteFor(a, b, v) BY <2>3
134	    <3>2. votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a] = votes[a] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
135	      BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
136	    <3>3. maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = b]
137	      BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
138	    <3>4. votes[a] \in SUBSET (Ballot \X Value) BY DEF TypeOK
139	    <3>5. <<b, v>> \in Ballot \X Value BY DEF Ballot
140	    <3>6. votes[a] \cup {<<b, v>>} \in SUBSET (Ballot \X Value)
141	      BY <3>4, <3>5
142	    <3>7. votes' \in [Acceptor -> SUBSET (Ballot \X Value)]
143	      BY <3>2, <3>6 DEF TypeOK
144	    <3>8. b \in Ballot \cup {-1} BY DEF Ballot
145	    <3>9. maxBal' \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]
146	      BY <3>3, <3>8 DEF TypeOK
147	    <3>. QED BY <3>7, <3>9 DEF TypeOK
148	  <2>. QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3
149	<1>. QED BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF vars
150	
151	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
152	\* Monotonicity of votes
153	
154	LEMMA Votes_Monotone ==
155	  ASSUME TypeOK, [Next]_vars,
156	         NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value,
157	         VotedFor(a, b, v)
158	  PROVE  VotedFor(a, b, v)'
159	PROOF
160	<1>1. CASE UNCHANGED vars
161	  BY <1>1 DEF vars, VotedFor
162	<1>2. CASE Next
163	  <2>1. PICK a2 \in Acceptor, b2 \in Ballot :
164	          \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a2, b2)
165	          \/ \E v2 \in Value : VoteFor(a2, b2, v2)
166	    BY <1>2 DEF Next
167	  <2>2. CASE IncreaseMaxBal(a2, b2)
168	    BY <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal, VotedFor
169	  <2>3. CASE \E v2 \in Value : VoteFor(a2, b2, v2)
170	    <3>1. PICK v2 \in Value : VoteFor(a2, b2, v2) BY <2>3
171	    <3>2. votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a2] = votes[a2] \cup {<<b2, v2>>}]
172	      BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
173	    <3>3. <<b, v>> \in votes[a] BY DEF VotedFor
174	    <3>4. CASE a = a2
175	      <4>1. votes'[a] = votes[a] \cup {<<b2, v2>>}
176	        BY <3>2, <3>4 DEF TypeOK
177	      <4>. QED BY <3>3, <4>1 DEF VotedFor
178	    <3>5. CASE a # a2
179	      <4>1. votes'[a] = votes[a]
180	        BY <3>2, <3>5 DEF TypeOK
181	      <4>. QED BY <3>3, <4>1 DEF VotedFor
182	    <3>. QED BY <3>4, <3>5
183	  <2>. QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3
184	<1>. QED BY <1>1, <1>2
185	
186	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
187	\* Chosen is monotonic
188	
189	LEMMA Chosen_Monotone ==
190	  ASSUME TypeOK, [Next]_vars
191	  PROVE  chosen \subseteq chosen'
192	PROOF
193	<1>. SUFFICES ASSUME TypeOK, [Next]_vars,
194	                     NEW v \in chosen
195	              PROVE  v \in chosen'
196	  OBVIOUS
197	<1>1. v \in Value /\ \E b \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b, v) BY DEF chosen
198	<1>2. PICK b \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b, v) BY <1>1
199	<1>3. PICK Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v) BY <1>2 DEF ChosenAt
200	<1>4. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)'
201	  <2>. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Q PROVE VotedFor(a, b, v)'
202	    OBVIOUS
203	  <2>1. a \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption
204	  <2>2. VotedFor(a, b, v) BY <1>3
205	  <2>. QED BY Votes_Monotone, <2>1, <2>2
206	<1>5. ChosenAt(b, v)' BY <1>4 DEF ChosenAt
207	<1>. QED BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>5 DEF chosen
208	
209	-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
210	\* SafeAt stability
211	
212	LEMMA SafeAt_Step ==
213	  ASSUME TypeOK, [Next]_vars,
214	         NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value,
215	         SafeAt(b, v)
216	  PROVE  SafeAt(b, v)'
217	PROOF
218	<1>. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW c \in 0..(b-1)
219	              PROVE  NoneOtherChoosableAt(c, v)'
220	  BY DEF SafeAt
221	<1>1. NoneOtherChoosableAt(c, v) BY DEF SafeAt
222	<1>2. PICK Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, c)
223	  BY <1>1 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
224	<1>3. c \in Ballot BY DEF Ballot
225	<1>4. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c, v)' \/ CannotVoteAt(a, c)'
226	  <2>. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Q
227	                PROVE  VotedFor(a, c, v)' \/ CannotVoteAt(a, c)'
228	    OBVIOUS
229	  <2>1. a \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption
230	  <2>2. VotedFor(a, c, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, c) BY <1>2
231	  <2>3. CASE VotedFor(a, c, v)
232	    <3>1. VotedFor(a, c, v)' BY <2>1, <1>3, Votes_Monotone, <2>3
233	    <3>. QED BY <3>1
234	  <2>4. CASE CannotVoteAt(a, c)
235	    <3>0. maxBal[a] > c /\ DidNotVoteAt(a, c) BY <2>4 DEF CannotVoteAt
236	    <3>00. maxBal[a] \in Ballot \cup {-1} BY <2>1 DEF TypeOK
237	    <3>0a. maxBal[a] \in Int BY <3>00 DEF Ballot
238	    <3>1. CASE UNCHANGED vars
239	      <4>1. maxBal[a]' = maxBal[a] BY <3>1 DEF vars
240	      <4>2. votes[a]' = votes[a] BY <3>1 DEF vars
241	      <4>3. DidNotVoteAt(a, c)' BY <3>0, <4>2 DEF DidNotVoteAt, VotedFor
242	      <4>4. maxBal[a]' > c BY <3>0, <4>1
243	      <4>. QED BY <4>3, <4>4 DEF CannotVoteAt
244	    <3>2. CASE Next
245	      <4>1. PICK a2 \in Acceptor, b2 \in Ballot :
246	              \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a2, b2)
247	              \/ \E v2 \in Value : VoteFor(a2, b2, v2)
248	        BY <3>2 DEF Next
249	      <4>2. CASE IncreaseMaxBal(a2, b2)
250	        <5>1. votes' = votes BY <4>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
251	        <5>2. DidNotVoteAt(a, c)'
252	          BY <3>0, <5>1 DEF DidNotVoteAt, VotedFor
253	        <5>3. CASE a = a2
254	          <6>1. maxBal[a2]' = b2 BY <4>2, <5>3 DEF IncreaseMaxBal, TypeOK
255	          <6>2. maxBal[a]' = b2 BY <5>3, <6>1
256	          <6>3. b2 \in Ballot BY DEF Ballot
257	          <6>4. b2 > maxBal[a2] BY <4>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
258	          <6>5. b2 > maxBal[a] BY <5>3, <6>4
259	          <6>6. maxBal[a]' > c BY <6>2, <6>5, <3>0, <3>0a, <6>3 DEF Ballot
260	          <6>. QED BY <5>2, <6>6 DEF CannotVoteAt
261	        <5>4. CASE a # a2
262	          <6>1. maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a2] = b2] BY <4>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
263	          <6>2. maxBal[a]' = maxBal[a] BY <5>4, <6>1 DEF TypeOK
264	          <6>. QED BY <5>2, <6>2, <3>0 DEF CannotVoteAt
265	        <5>. QED BY <5>3, <5>4
266	      <4>3. CASE \E v2 \in Value : VoteFor(a2, b2, v2)
267	        <5>1. PICK v2 \in Value : VoteFor(a2, b2, v2) BY <4>3
268	        <5>2. votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a2] = votes[a2] \cup {<<b2, v2>>}]
269	          BY <5>1 DEF VoteFor
270	        <5>3. maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a2] = b2]
271	          BY <5>1 DEF VoteFor
272	        <5>4. maxBal[a2] <= b2 BY <5>1 DEF VoteFor
273	        <5>5. CASE a = a2
274	          <6>1. maxBal[a]' = b2 BY <5>3, <5>5 DEF TypeOK
275	          <6>2. votes[a]' = votes[a] \cup {<<b2, v2>>} BY <5>2, <5>5 DEF TypeOK
276	          <6>3. b2 \in Ballot BY DEF Ballot
277	          <6>4. maxBal[a] <= b2 BY <5>4, <5>5
278	          \* maxBal[a] > c and maxBal[a] <= b2, so c < b2
279	          <6>5. c < b2
280	            <7>1. c < maxBal[a] BY <3>0, <3>0a, <6>3 DEF Ballot
281	            <7>. QED BY <6>4, <7>1, <3>0a, <6>3 DEF Ballot
282	          <6>6. b2 > c BY <6>5
283	          <6>7. maxBal[a]' > c BY <6>1, <6>6
284	          \* DidNotVoteAt(a, c)' = \A v3 : ~VotedFor(a, c, v3)'
285	          \* VotedFor(a, c, v3)' = <<c, v3>> \in votes'[a] = votes[a] \cup {<<b2, v2>>}
286	          \* Since c < b2, <<c, v3>> # <<b2, v2>> (as ballots differ).
287	          \* So <<c, v3>> \in votes[a] iff <<c, v3>> \in votes[a].
288	          \* So VotedFor(a, c, v3)' iff VotedFor(a, c, v3), and DidNotVoteAt(a, c) holds.
289	          <6>8. DidNotVoteAt(a, c)'
290	            <7>. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW v3 \in Value
291	                          PROVE  ~ VotedFor(a, c, v3)'
292	              BY DEF DidNotVoteAt
293	            <7>1. ~ VotedFor(a, c, v3) BY <3>0 DEF DidNotVoteAt
294	            <7>2. <<c, v3>> \notin votes[a] BY <7>1 DEF VotedFor
295	            <7>3. c # b2 BY <6>5
296	            <7>4. <<c, v3>> # <<b2, v2>> BY <7>3
297	            <7>5. <<c, v3>> \notin votes[a] \cup {<<b2, v2>>} BY <7>2, <7>4
298	            <7>6. <<c, v3>> \notin votes'[a] BY <7>5, <6>2
299	            <7>. QED BY <7>6 DEF VotedFor

file.content:
LEMMA InitInv == Init => Inv
  BY InitTypeOK, InitVotesSafe, InitOneValuePerBallot DEF Inv

LEMMA InitChosenEmpty == Init => chosen = {}
  BY DEF Init, chosen, ChosenAt, VotedFor, Ballot

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Action-level helpers

LEMMA TypeOK_Step ==
  ASSUME TypeOK, [Next]_vars
  PROVE  TypeOK'
PROOF
<1> SUFFICES ASSUME TypeOK,
                    [Next]_vars
             PROVE  TypeOK'
  OBVIOUS
<1>1. CASE UNCHANGED vars
  BY <1>1 DEF TypeOK, vars
<1>2. CASE Next
  <2>1. PICK a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot :
          \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a, b)
          \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(a, b, v)
    BY <1>2 DEF Next
  <2>2. CASE IncreaseMaxBal(a, b)
    <3>1. votes' = votes BY <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
    <3>2. maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = b] BY <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
    <3>3. b \in Ballot \cup {-1} BY DEF Ballot
    <3>4. maxBal' \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]
      BY <3>2, <3>3 DEF TypeOK
    <3>. QED BY <3>1, <3>4 DEF TypeOK
  <2>3. CASE \E v \in Value : VoteFor(a, b, v)
    <3>1. PICK v \in Value : VoteFor(a, b, v) BY <2>3
    <3>2. votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a] = votes[a] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
      BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
    <3>3. maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = b]
      BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
    <3>4. votes[a] \in SUBSET (Ballot \X Value) BY DEF TypeOK
    <3>5. <<b, v>> \in Ballot \X Value BY DEF Ballot
    <3>6. votes[a] \cup {<<b, v>>} \in SUBSET (Ballot \X Value)
      BY <3>4, <3>5
    <3>7. votes' \in [Acceptor -> SUBSET (Ballot \X Value)]
      BY <3>2, <3>6 DEF TypeOK
    <3>8. b \in Ballot \cup {-1} BY DEF Ballot
    <3>9. maxBal' \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]
      BY <3>3, <3>8 DEF TypeOK
    <3>. QED BY <3>7, <3>9 DEF TypeOK
  <2>. QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3
<1>. QED BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Monotonicity of votes

LEMMA Votes_Monotone ==
  ASSUME TypeOK, [Next]_vars,
         NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value,
         VotedFor(a, b, v)
  PROVE  VotedFor(a, b, v)'
PROOF
<1>1. CASE UNCHANGED vars
  BY <1>1 DEF vars, VotedFor
<1>2. CASE Next
  <2>1. PICK a2 \in Acceptor, b2 \in Ballot :
          \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a2, b2)
          \/ \E v2 \in Value : VoteFor(a2, b2, v2)
    BY <1>2 DEF Next
  <2>2. CASE IncreaseMaxBal(a2, b2)
    BY <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal, VotedFor
  <2>3. CASE \E v2 \in Value : VoteFor(a2, b2, v2)
    <3>1. PICK v2 \in Value : VoteFor(a2, b2, v2) BY <2>3
    <3>2. votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a2] = votes[a2] \cup {<<b2, v2>>}]
      BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
    <3>3. <<b, v>> \in votes[a] BY DEF VotedFor
    <3>4. CASE a = a2
      <4>1. votes'[a] = votes[a] \cup {<<b2, v2>>}
        BY <3>2, <3>4 DEF TypeOK
      <4>. QED BY <3>3, <4>1 DEF VotedFor
    <3>5. CASE a # a2
      <4>1. votes'[a] = votes[a]
        BY <3>2, <3>5 DEF TypeOK
      <4>. QED BY <3>3, <4>1 DEF VotedFor
    <3>. QED BY <3>4, <3>5
  <2>. QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3
<1>. QED BY <1>1, <1>2

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Chosen is monotonic

LEMMA Chosen_Monotone ==
  ASSUME TypeOK, [Next]_vars
  PROVE  chosen \subseteq chosen'
PROOF
<1>. SUFFICES ASSUME TypeOK, [Next]_vars,
                     NEW v \in chosen
              PROVE  v \in chosen'
  OBVIOUS
<1>1. v \in Value /\ \E b \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b, v) BY DEF chosen
<1>2. PICK b \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b, v) BY <1>1
<1>3. PICK Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v) BY <1>2 DEF ChosenAt
<1>4. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)'
  <2>. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Q PROVE VotedFor(a, b, v)'
    OBVIOUS
  <2>1. a \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption
  <2>2. VotedFor(a, b, v) BY <1>3
  <2>. QED BY Votes_Monotone, <2>1, <2>2
<1>5. ChosenAt(b, v)' BY <1>4 DEF ChosenAt
<1>. QED BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>5 DEF chosen

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* SafeAt stability

LEMMA SafeAt_Step ==
  ASSUME TypeOK, [Next]_vars,
         NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value,
         SafeAt(b, v)
  PROVE  SafeAt(b, v)'
PROOF
<1>. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW c \in 0..(b-1)
              PROVE  NoneOtherChoosableAt(c, v)'
  BY DEF SafeAt
<1>1. NoneOtherChoosableAt(c, v) BY DEF SafeAt
<1>2. PICK Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, c)
  BY <1>1 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
<1>3. c \in Ballot BY DEF Ballot
<1>4. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c, v)' \/ CannotVoteAt(a, c)'
  <2>. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Q
                PROVE  VotedFor(a, c, v)' \/ CannotVoteAt(a, c)'
    OBVIOUS
  <2>1. a \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption
  <2>2. VotedFor(a, c, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, c) BY <1>2
  <2>3. CASE VotedFor(a, c, v)
    <3>1. VotedFor(a, c, v)' BY <2>1, <1>3, Votes_Monotone, <2>3
    <3>. QED BY <3>1
  <2>4. CASE CannotVoteAt(a, c)
    <3>0. maxBal[a] > c /\ DidNotVoteAt(a, c) BY <2>4 DEF CannotVoteAt
    <3>00. maxBal[a] \in Ballot \cup {-1} BY <2>1 DEF TypeOK
    <3>0a. maxBal[a] \in Int BY <3>00 DEF Ballot
    <3>1. CASE UNCHANGED vars
      <4>1. maxBal[a]' = maxBal[a] BY <3>1 DEF vars
      <4>2. votes[a]' = votes[a] BY <3>1 DEF vars
      <4>3. DidNotVoteAt(a, c)' BY <3>0, <4>2 DEF DidNotVoteAt, VotedFor
      <4>4. maxBal[a]' > c BY <3>0, <4>1
      <4>. QED BY <4>3, <4>4 DEF CannotVoteAt
    <3>2. CASE Next
      <4>1. PICK a2 \in Acceptor, b2 \in Ballot :
              \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a2, b2)
              \/ \E v2 \in Value : VoteFor(a2, b2, v2)
        BY <3>2 DEF Next
      <4>2. CASE IncreaseMaxBal(a2, b2)
        <5>1. votes' = votes BY <4>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
        <5>2. DidNotVoteAt(a, c)'
          BY <3>0, <5>1 DEF DidNotVoteAt, VotedFor
        <5>3. CASE a = a2
          <6>1. maxBal[a2]' = b2 BY <4>2, <5>3 DEF IncreaseMaxBal, TypeOK
          <6>2. maxBal[a]' = b2 BY <5>3, <6>1
          <6>3. b2 \in Ballot BY DEF Ballot
          <6>4. b2 > maxBal[a2] BY <4>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
          <6>5. b2 > maxBal[a] BY <5>3, <6>4
          <6>6. maxBal[a]' > c BY <6>2, <6>5, <3>0, <3>0a, <6>3 DEF Ballot
          <6>. QED BY <5>2, <6>6 DEF CannotVoteAt
        <5>4. CASE a # a2
          <6>1. maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a2] = b2] BY <4>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
          <6>2. maxBal[a]' = maxBal[a] BY <5>4, <6>1 DEF TypeOK
          <6>. QED BY <5>2, <6>2, <3>0 DEF CannotVoteAt
        <5>. QED BY <5>3, <5>4
      <4>3. CASE \E v2 \in Value : VoteFor(a2, b2, v2)
        <5>1. PICK v2 \in Value : VoteFor(a2, b2, v2) BY <4>3
        <5>2. votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a2] = votes[a2] \cup {<<b2, v2>>}]
          BY <5>1 DEF VoteFor
        <5>3. maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a2] = b2]
          BY <5>1 DEF VoteFor
        <5>4. maxBal[a2] <= b2 BY <5>1 DEF VoteFor
        <5>5. CASE a = a2
          <6>1. maxBal[a]' = b2 BY <5>3, <5>5 DEF TypeOK
          <6>2. votes[a]' = votes[a] \cup {<<b2, v2>>} BY <5>2, <5>5 DEF TypeOK
          <6>3. b2 \in Ballot BY DEF Ballot
          <6>4. maxBal[a] <= b2 BY <5>4, <5>5
          \* maxBal[a] > c and maxBal[a] <= b2, so c < b2
          <6>5. c < b2
            <7>1. c < maxBal[a] BY <3>0, <3>0a, <6>3 DEF Ballot
            <7>. QED BY <6>4, <7>1, <3>0a, <6>3 DEF Ballot
          <6>6. b2 > c BY <6>5
          <6>7. maxBal[a]' > c BY <6>1, <6>6
          \* DidNotVoteAt(a, c)' = \A v3 : ~VotedFor(a, c, v3)'
          \* VotedFor(a, c, v3)' = <<c, v3>> \in votes'[a] = votes[a] \cup {<<b2, v2>>}
          \* Since c < b2, <<c, v3>> # <<b2, v2>> (as ballots differ).
          \* So <<c, v3>> \in votes[a] iff <<c, v3>> \in votes[a].
          \* So VotedFor(a, c, v3)' iff VotedFor(a, c, v3), and DidNotVoteAt(a, c) holds.
          <6>8. DidNotVoteAt(a, c)'
            <7>. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW v3 \in Value
                          PROVE  ~ VotedFor(a, c, v3)'
              BY DEF DidNotVoteAt
            <7>1. ~ VotedFor(a, c, v3) BY <3>0 DEF DidNotVoteAt
            <7>2. <<c, v3>> \notin votes[a] BY <7>1 DEF VotedFor
            <7>3. c # b2 BY <6>5
            <7>4. <<c, v3>> # <<b2, v2>> BY <7>3
            <7>5. <<c, v3>> \notin votes[a] \cup {<<b2, v2>>} BY <7>2, <7>4
            <7>6. <<c, v3>> \notin votes'[a] BY <7>5, <6>2
            <7>. QED BY <7>6 DEF VotedFor

content.text: The parser issue likely comes from multiple `<L>.` (unnumbered) labels in the same proof. Let me rewrite using numbered labels consistently, and also fix the invalid `WHERE` clause in Refinement_Step:

input.content:
------------------------------- MODULE Voting_Refinement -------------------------------
EXTENDS FiniteSets, TLAPS, Integers
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value, Acceptor, Quorum

ASSUME QuorumAssumption ==
    /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
    /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VARIABLES votes, maxBal

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteAt(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v) ==
  /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq b
  /\ \E c \in -1..(b-1) :
      /\ (c # -1) => \E a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c, v)
      /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Init ==
    /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
    /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

IncreaseMaxBal(a, b) ==
  /\ b > maxBal[a]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(a, b, v) ==
    /\ maxBal[a] <= b
    /\ \A vt \in votes[a] : vt[1] # b
    /\ \A c \in Acceptor \ {a} :
         \A vt \in votes[c] : (vt[1] = b) => (vt[2] = v)
    /\ \E Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v)
    /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a] = votes[a] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
    /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = b]
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Next ==
    \E a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot :
        \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a, b)
        \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(a, b, v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<votes, maxBal>>
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
ChosenAt(b, v) ==
    \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b, v)}

---------------------------------------------------------------------------

vars == <<votes, maxBal>>

TypeOK == /\ votes \in [Acceptor -> SUBSET (Ballot \X Value)]
          /\ maxBal \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]

CannotVoteAt(a, b) ==
    /\ maxBal[a] > b
    /\ DidNotVoteAt(a, b)

NoneOtherChoosableAt(b, v) ==
    \E Q \in Quorum :
        \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, b)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
    \A c \in 0..(b-1) : NoneOtherChoosableAt(c, v)

VotesSafe ==
    \A a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
        VotedFor(a, b, v) => SafeAt(b, v)

OneValuePerBallot ==
    \A a1, a2 \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v1, v2 \in Value :
        VotedFor(a1, b, v1) /\ VotedFor(a2, b, v2) => (v1 = v2)

Inv == TypeOK /\ VotesSafe /\ OneValuePerBallot

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

LEMMA QuorumNonEmpty == \A Q \in Quorum : Q # {}
  BY QuorumAssumption

LEMMA InitTypeOK == Init => TypeOK
  BY DEF Init, TypeOK, Ballot

LEMMA InitVotesSafe == Init => VotesSafe
  BY DEF Init, VotesSafe, VotedFor

LEMMA InitOneValuePerBallot == Init => OneValuePerBallot
  BY DEF Init, OneValuePerBallot, VotedFor

LEMMA InitInv == Init => Inv
  BY InitTypeOK, InitVotesSafe, InitOneValuePerBallot DEF Inv

LEMMA InitChosenEmpty == Init => chosen = {}
  BY DEF Init, chosen, ChosenAt, VotedFor, Ballot

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Action-level helpers

LEMMA TypeOK_Step ==
  ASSUME TypeOK, [Next]_vars
  PROVE  TypeOK'
PROOF
<1>1. CASE UNCHANGED vars
  BY <1>1 DEF TypeOK, vars
<1>2. CASE Next
  <2>1. PICK a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot :
          \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a, b)
          \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(a, b, v)
    BY <1>2 DEF Next
  <2>2. CASE IncreaseMaxBal(a, b)
    <3>1. votes' = votes BY <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
    <3>2. maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = b] BY <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
    <3>3. b \in Ballot \cup {-1} BY DEF Ballot
    <3>4. maxBal' \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]
      BY <3>2, <3>3 DEF TypeOK
    <3>5. QED BY <3>1, <3>4 DEF TypeOK
  <2>3. CASE \E v \in Value : VoteFor(a, b, v)
    <3>1. PICK v \in Value : VoteFor(a, b, v) BY <2>3
    <3>2. votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a] = votes[a] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
      BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
    <3>3. maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = b]
      BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
    <3>4. votes[a] \in SUBSET (Ballot \X Value) BY DEF TypeOK
    <3>5. <<b, v>> \in Ballot \X Value BY DEF Ballot
    <3>6. votes[a] \cup {<<b, v>>} \in SUBSET (Ballot \X Value)
      BY <3>4, <3>5
    <3>7. votes' \in [Acceptor -> SUBSET (Ballot \X Value)]
      BY <3>2, <3>6 DEF TypeOK
    <3>8. b \in Ballot \cup {-1} BY DEF Ballot
    <3>9. maxBal' \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]
      BY <3>3, <3>8 DEF TypeOK
    <3>10. QED BY <3>7, <3>9 DEF TypeOK
  <2>4. QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3
<1>3. QED BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Monotonicity of votes

LEMMA Votes_Monotone ==
  ASSUME TypeOK, [Next]_vars,
         NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value,
         VotedFor(a, b, v)
  PROVE  VotedFor(a, b, v)'
PROOF
<1>1. CASE UNCHANGED vars
  BY <1>1 DEF vars, VotedFor
<1>2. CASE Next
  <2>1. PICK a2 \in Acceptor, b2 \in Ballot :
          \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a2, b2)
          \/ \E v2 \in Value : VoteFor(a2, b2, v2)
    BY <1>2 DEF Next
  <2>2. CASE IncreaseMaxBal(a2, b2)
    BY <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal, VotedFor
  <2>3. CASE \E v2 \in Value : VoteFor(a2, b2, v2)
    <3>1. PICK v2 \in Value : VoteFor(a2, b2, v2) BY <2>3
    <3>2. votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a2] = votes[a2] \cup {<<b2, v2>>}]
      BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
    <3>3. <<b, v>> \in votes[a] BY DEF VotedFor
    <3>4. CASE a = a2
      <4>1. votes'[a] = votes[a] \cup {<<b2, v2>>}
        BY <3>2, <3>4 DEF TypeOK
      <4>2. QED BY <3>3, <4>1 DEF VotedFor
    <3>5. CASE a # a2
      <4>1. votes'[a] = votes[a]
        BY <3>2, <3>5 DEF TypeOK
      <4>2. QED BY <3>3, <4>1 DEF VotedFor
    <3>6. QED BY <3>4, <3>5
  <2>4. QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3
<1>3. QED BY <1>1, <1>2

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Chosen is monotonic

LEMMA Chosen_Monotone ==
  ASSUME TypeOK, [Next]_vars
  PROVE  chosen \subseteq chosen'
PROOF
<1>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW v \in chosen
               PROVE  v \in chosen'
  OBVIOUS
<1>2. v \in Value /\ \E b \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b, v) BY DEF chosen
<1>3. PICK b \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b, v) BY <1>2
<1>4. PICK Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v) BY <1>3 DEF ChosenAt
<1>5. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)'
  <2>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Q PROVE VotedFor(a, b, v)'
    OBVIOUS
  <2>2. a \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption
  <2>3. VotedFor(a, b, v) BY <1>4
  <2>4. QED BY Votes_Monotone, <2>2, <2>3
<1>6. ChosenAt(b, v)' BY <1>5 DEF ChosenAt
<1>7. QED BY <1>2, <1>3, <1>6 DEF chosen

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* SafeAt stability

LEMMA SafeAt_Step ==
  ASSUME TypeOK, [Next]_vars,
         NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value,
         SafeAt(b, v)
  PROVE  SafeAt(b, v)'
PROOF
<1>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW c \in 0..(b-1)
               PROVE  NoneOtherChoosableAt(c, v)'
  BY DEF SafeAt
<1>2. NoneOtherChoosableAt(c, v) BY DEF SafeAt
<1>3. PICK Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, c)
  BY <1>2 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
<1>4. c \in Ballot BY DEF Ballot
<1>5. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c, v)' \/ CannotVoteAt(a, c)'
  <2>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Q
                 PROVE  VotedFor(a, c, v)' \/ CannotVoteAt(a, c)'
    OBVIOUS
  <2>2. a \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption
  <2>3. VotedFor(a, c, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, c) BY <1>3
  <2>4. CASE VotedFor(a, c, v)
    <3>1. VotedFor(a, c, v)' BY <2>2, <1>4, Votes_Monotone, <2>4
    <3>2. QED BY <3>1
  <2>5. CASE CannotVoteAt(a, c)
    <3>1. maxBal[a] > c /\ DidNotVoteAt(a, c) BY <2>5 DEF CannotVoteAt
    <3>2. maxBal[a] \in Ballot \cup {-1} BY <2>2 DEF TypeOK
    <3>3. maxBal[a] \in Int BY <3>2 DEF Ballot
    <3>4. CASE UNCHANGED vars
      <4>1. maxBal[a]' = maxBal[a] BY <3>4 DEF vars
      <4>2. votes[a]' = votes[a] BY <3>4 DEF vars
      <4>3. DidNotVoteAt(a, c)' BY <3>1, <4>2 DEF DidNotVoteAt, VotedFor
      <4>4. maxBal[a]' > c BY <3>1, <4>1
      <4>5. QED BY <4>3, <4>4 DEF CannotVoteAt
    <3>5. CASE Next
      <4>1. PICK a2 \in Acceptor, b2 \in Ballot :
              \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a2, b2)
              \/ \E v2 \in Value : VoteFor(a2, b2, v2)
        BY <3>5 DEF Next
      <4>2. CASE IncreaseMaxBal(a2, b2)
        <5>1. votes' = votes BY <4>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
        <5>2. DidNotVoteAt(a, c)'
          BY <3>1, <5>1 DEF DidNotVoteAt, VotedFor
        <5>3. CASE a = a2
          <6>1. maxBal[a2]' = b2 BY <4>2, <5>3 DEF IncreaseMaxBal, TypeOK
          <6>2. maxBal[a]' = b2 BY <5>3, <6>1
          <6>3. b2 \in Ballot BY DEF Ballot
          <6>4. b2 > maxBal[a2] BY <4>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
          <6>5. b2 > maxBal[a] BY <5>3, <6>4
          <6>6. maxBal[a]' > c BY <6>2, <6>5, <3>1, <3>3, <6>3 DEF Ballot
          <6>7. QED BY <5>2, <6>6 DEF CannotVoteAt
        <5>4. CASE a # a2
          <6>1. maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a2] = b2] BY <4>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
          <6>2. maxBal[a]' = maxBal[a] BY <5>4, <6>1 DEF TypeOK
          <6>3. QED BY <5>2, <6>2, <3>1 DEF CannotVoteAt
        <5>5. QED BY <5>3, <5>4
      <4>3. CASE \E v2 \in Value : VoteFor(a2, b2, v2)
        <5>1. PICK v2 \in Value : VoteFor(a2, b2, v2) BY <4>3
        <5>2. votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a2] = votes[a2] \cup {<<b2, v2>>}]
          BY <5>1 DEF VoteFor
        <5>3. maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a2] = b2]
          BY <5>1 DEF VoteFor
        <5>4. maxBal[a2] <= b2 BY <5>1 DEF VoteFor
        <5>5. CASE a = a2
          <6>1. maxBal[a]' = b2 BY <5>3, <5>5 DEF TypeOK
          <6>2. votes[a]' = votes[a] \cup {<<b2, v2>>} BY <5>2, <5>5 DEF TypeOK
          <6>3. b2 \in Ballot BY DEF Ballot
          <6>4. maxBal[a] <= b2 BY <5>4, <5>5
          <6>5. c < b2
            <7>1. c < maxBal[a] BY <3>1, <3>3, <6>3 DEF Ballot
            <7>2. QED BY <6>4, <7>1, <3>3, <6>3 DEF Ballot
          <6>6. b2 > c BY <6>5
          <6>7. maxBal[a]' > c BY <6>1, <6>6
          <6>8. DidNotVoteAt(a, c)'
            <7>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW v3 \in Value
                           PROVE  ~ VotedFor(a, c, v3)'
              BY DEF DidNotVoteAt
            <7>2. ~ VotedFor(a, c, v3) BY <3>1 DEF DidNotVoteAt
            <7>3. <<c, v3>> \notin votes[a] BY <7>2 DEF VotedFor
            <7>4. c # b2 BY <6>5
            <7>5. <<c, v3>> # <<b2, v2>> BY <7>4
            <7>6. <<c, v3>> \notin votes[a] \cup {<<b2, v2>>} BY <7>3, <7>5
            <7>7. <<c, v3>> \notin votes'[a] BY <7>6, <6>2
            <7>8. QED BY <7>7 DEF VotedFor
          <6>9. QED BY <6>7, <6>8 DEF CannotVoteAt
        <5>6. CASE a # a2
          <6>1. maxBal[a]' = maxBal[a] BY <5>3, <5>6 DEF TypeOK
          <6>2. votes[a]' = votes[a] BY <5>2, <5>6 DEF TypeOK
          <6>3. DidNotVoteAt(a, c)' BY <3>1, <6>2 DEF DidNotVoteAt, VotedFor
          <6>4. QED BY <6>1, <6>3, <3>1 DEF CannotVoteAt
        <5>7. QED BY <5>5, <5>6
      <4>4. QED BY <4>1, <4>2, <4>3
    <3>6. QED BY <3>4, <3>5 DEF vars
  <2>6. QED BY <2>3, <2>4, <2>5
<1>6. QED BY <1>5 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* AllSafeAtZero: any value is safe at ballot 0

LEMMA AllSafeAtZero == \A v \in Value : SafeAt(0, v)
PROOF
<1>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW v \in Value
               PROVE  SafeAt(0, v)
  OBVIOUS
<1>2. 0..(0-1) = {}
  OBVIOUS
<1>3. QED BY <1>2 DEF SafeAt

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* ShowsSafety: ShowsSafeAt implies SafeAt under Inv

LEMMA ShowsSafety ==
  ASSUME Inv,
         NEW Q \in Quorum, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value,
         ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v)
  PROVE  SafeAt(b, v)
PROOF
<1>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW d \in 0..(b-1)
               PROVE  NoneOtherChoosableAt(d, v)
  BY DEF SafeAt
<1>2. PICK c \in -1..(b-1) :
        /\ (c # -1) => \E aa \in Q : VotedFor(aa, c, v)
        /\ \A dd \in (c+1)..(b-1), aa \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(aa, dd)
  BY DEF ShowsSafeAt
<1>3. \A aa \in Q : maxBal[aa] \geq b BY DEF ShowsSafeAt
<1>4. b \in Nat BY DEF Ballot
<1>5. c \in Int /\ c >= -1 /\ c <= b - 1
  BY <1>4
<1>6. d \in Int /\ d >= 0 /\ d <= b - 1
  BY <1>4
<1>7. CASE d = c
  <2>1. c # -1 BY <1>7, <1>6
  <2>2. PICK aa \in Q : VotedFor(aa, c, v) BY <1>2, <2>1
  <2>3. VotedFor(aa, d, v) BY <2>2, <1>7
  <2>4. \E QQ \in Quorum : \A x \in QQ : VotedFor(x, d, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(x, d)
    <3>1. \A x \in Q : VotedFor(x, d, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(x, d)
      <4>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW x \in Q
                     PROVE  VotedFor(x, d, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(x, d)
        OBVIOUS
      <4>2. x \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption
      <4>3. CASE x = aa
        BY <2>3, <4>3
      <4>4. CASE x # aa
        <5>1. CASE DidNotVoteAt(x, d)
          <6>1. maxBal[x] \geq b BY <1>3
          <6>2. b > d
            <7>1. d \in Nat BY <1>6
            <7>2. d < b BY <1>6
            <7>3. QED BY <7>1, <7>2, <1>4
          <6>3. maxBal[x] \in Ballot \cup {-1} BY <4>2 DEF TypeOK, Inv
          <6>4. maxBal[x] > d BY <6>1, <6>2, <6>3 DEF Ballot
          <6>5. QED BY <6>4, <5>1 DEF CannotVoteAt
        <5>2. CASE ~ DidNotVoteAt(x, d)
          <6>1. \E vv \in Value : VotedFor(x, d, vv) BY <5>2 DEF DidNotVoteAt
          <6>2. PICK vv \in Value : VotedFor(x, d, vv) BY <6>1
          <6>3. VotedFor(aa, d, v) BY <2>3
          <6>4. aa \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption
          <6>5. d \in Ballot BY <1>6 DEF Ballot
          <6>6. vv = v BY <6>2, <6>3, <4>2, <6>4, <6>5 DEF OneValuePerBallot, Inv
          <6>7. VotedFor(x, d, v) BY <6>2, <6>6
          <6>8. QED BY <6>7
        <5>3. QED BY <5>1, <5>2
      <4>5. QED BY <4>3, <4>4
    <3>2. QED BY <3>1
  <2>5. QED BY <2>4 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
<1>8. CASE d # c
  <2>1. d \in 0..(b-1) BY <1>6
  <2>2. CASE d \in (c+1)..(b-1)
    <3>1. \A aa \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(aa, d) BY <2>2, <1>2
    <3>2. \E QQ \in Quorum : \A aa \in QQ : VotedFor(aa, d, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(aa, d)
      <4>1. \A aa \in Q : VotedFor(aa, d, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(aa, d)
        <5>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW aa \in Q
                       PROVE  VotedFor(aa, d, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(aa, d)
          OBVIOUS
        <5>2. aa \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption
        <5>3. DidNotVoteAt(aa, d) BY <3>1
        <5>4. maxBal[aa] \geq b BY <1>3
        <5>5. b > d
          <6>1. d \in Nat BY <1>6
          <6>2. d < b BY <1>6
          <6>3. QED BY <6>1, <6>2, <1>4
        <5>6. maxBal[aa] \in Ballot \cup {-1} BY <5>2 DEF TypeOK, Inv
        <5>7. maxBal[aa] > d BY <5>4, <5>5, <5>6 DEF Ballot
        <5>8. CannotVoteAt(aa, d) BY <5>3, <5>7 DEF CannotVoteAt
        <5>9. QED BY <5>8
      <4>2. QED BY <4>1
    <3>3. QED BY <3>2 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
  <2>3. CASE d \notin (c+1)..(b-1)
    \* Then d < c+1, so d <= c, so (since d # c) d < c. We need c \in 0..(b-1) and use VotesSafe of aa.
    <3>1. d < c+1 BY <2>3, <2>1, <1>5
    <3>2. d <= c BY <3>1
    <3>3. d < c BY <3>2, <1>8
    <3>4. c # -1 BY <3>3, <1>6
    <3>5. c \in 0..(b-1) BY <3>4, <1>5
    <3>6. PICK aa \in Q : VotedFor(aa, c, v) BY <1>2, <3>4
    <3>7. aa \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption
    <3>8. c \in Ballot BY <3>5 DEF Ballot
    <3>9. SafeAt(c, v) BY <3>6, <3>7, <3>8 DEF VotesSafe, Inv
    <3>10. d \in 0..(c-1) BY <3>3, <1>6
    <3>11. NoneOtherChoosableAt(d, v) BY <3>10, <3>9 DEF SafeAt
    <3>12. QED BY <3>11
  <2>4. QED BY <2>2, <2>3
<1>9. QED BY <1>7, <1>8

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* OneValuePerBallot preservation

LEMMA OneValuePerBallot_Step ==
  ASSUME Inv, [Next]_vars
  PROVE  OneValuePerBallot'
PROOF
<1>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a1 \in Acceptor, NEW a2 \in Acceptor,
                      NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v1 \in Value, NEW v2 \in Value,
                      VotedFor(a1, b, v1)', VotedFor(a2, b, v2)'
               PROVE  v1 = v2
  BY DEF OneValuePerBallot
<1>2. CASE UNCHANGED vars
  <2>1. votes' = votes BY <1>2 DEF vars
  <2>2. VotedFor(a1, b, v1) BY <2>1 DEF VotedFor
  <2>3. VotedFor(a2, b, v2) BY <2>1 DEF VotedFor
  <2>4. QED BY <2>2, <2>3 DEF OneValuePerBallot, Inv
<1>3. CASE Next
  <2>1. PICK a3 \in Acceptor, b3 \in Ballot :
          \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a3, b3)
          \/ \E v3 \in Value : VoteFor(a3, b3, v3)
    BY <1>3 DEF Next
  <2>2. CASE IncreaseMaxBal(a3, b3)
    <3>1. votes' = votes BY <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
    <3>2. VotedFor(a1, b, v1) BY <3>1 DEF VotedFor
    <3>3. VotedFor(a2, b, v2) BY <3>1 DEF VotedFor
    <3>4. QED BY <3>2, <3>3 DEF OneValuePerBallot, Inv
  <2>3. CASE \E v3 \in Value : VoteFor(a3, b3, v3)
    <3>1. PICK v3 \in Value : VoteFor(a3, b3, v3) BY <2>3
    <3>2. votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a3] = votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>}]
      BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
    <3>3. \A vt \in votes[a3] : vt[1] # b3 BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
    <3>4. \A c \in Acceptor \ {a3} : \A vt \in votes[c] : vt[1] = b3 => vt[2] = v3
      BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
    <3>5. votes'[a3] = votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>}
      BY <3>2 DEF TypeOK, Inv
    <3>6. \A x \in Acceptor \ {a3} : votes'[x] = votes[x]
      BY <3>2 DEF TypeOK, Inv
    <3>7. CASE a1 = a3 /\ a2 = a3
      <4>1. <<b, v1>> \in votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>} BY <3>5, <3>7 DEF VotedFor
      <4>2. <<b, v2>> \in votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>} BY <3>5, <3>7 DEF VotedFor
      <4>3. CASE <<b, v1>> = <<b3, v3>> /\ <<b, v2>> = <<b3, v3>>
        BY <4>3
      <4>4. CASE <<b, v1>> = <<b3, v3>> /\ <<b, v2>> \in votes[a3]
        <5>1. b = b3 BY <4>4
        <5>2. v1 = v3 BY <4>4
        <5>3. <<b, v2>> \in votes[a3] /\ (<<b, v2>>)[1] = b BY <4>4
        <5>4. \E vt \in votes[a3] : vt[1] = b3 BY <5>1, <5>3
        <5>5. FALSE BY <5>4, <3>3, <5>1
        <5>6. QED BY <5>5
      <4>5. CASE <<b, v1>> \in votes[a3] /\ <<b, v2>> = <<b3, v3>>
        <5>1. b = b3 BY <4>5
        <5>2. <<b, v1>> \in votes[a3] /\ (<<b, v1>>)[1] = b BY <4>5
        <5>3. FALSE BY <5>2, <3>3, <5>1
        <5>4. QED BY <5>3
      <4>6. CASE <<b, v1>> \in votes[a3] /\ <<b, v2>> \in votes[a3]
        <5>1. VotedFor(a3, b, v1) BY <4>6 DEF VotedFor
        <5>2. VotedFor(a3, b, v2) BY <4>6 DEF VotedFor
        <5>3. QED BY <5>1, <5>2 DEF OneValuePerBallot, Inv
      <4>7. QED BY <4>1, <4>2, <4>3, <4>4, <4>5, <4>6
    <3>8. CASE a1 = a3 /\ a2 # a3
      <4>1. <<b, v1>> \in votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>} BY <3>5, <3>8 DEF VotedFor
      <4>2. votes'[a2] = votes[a2] BY <3>6, <3>8
      <4>3. <<b, v2>> \in votes[a2] BY <4>2 DEF VotedFor
      <4>4. VotedFor(a2, b, v2) BY <4>3 DEF VotedFor
      <4>5. CASE <<b, v1>> = <<b3, v3>>
        <5>1. b = b3 BY <4>5
        <5>2. v1 = v3 BY <4>5
        <5>3. (<<b, v2>>)[1] = b3 BY <5>1
        <5>4. (<<b, v2>>)[2] = v3 BY <3>4, <4>3, <3>8, <5>3
        <5>5. v2 = v3 BY <5>4
        <5>6. QED BY <5>2, <5>5
      <4>6. CASE <<b, v1>> \in votes[a3]
        <5>1. VotedFor(a3, b, v1) BY <4>6 DEF VotedFor
        <5>2. QED BY <5>1, <4>4 DEF OneValuePerBallot, Inv
      <4>7. QED BY <4>1, <4>5, <4>6
    <3>9. CASE a1 # a3 /\ a2 = a3
      <4>1. <<b, v2>> \in votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>} BY <3>5, <3>9 DEF VotedFor
      <4>2. votes'[a1] = votes[a1] BY <3>6, <3>9
      <4>3. <<b, v1>> \in votes[a1] BY <4>2 DEF VotedFor
      <4>4. VotedFor(a1, b, v1) BY <4>3 DEF VotedFor
      <4>5. CASE <<b, v2>> = <<b3, v3>>
        <5>1. b = b3 BY <4>5
        <5>2. v2 = v3 BY <4>5
        <5>3. (<<b, v1>>)[1] = b3 BY <5>1
        <5>4. (<<b, v1>>)[2] = v3 BY <3>4, <4>3, <3>9, <5>3
        <5>5. v1 = v3 BY <5>4
        <5>6. QED BY <5>2, <5>5
      <4>6. CASE <<b, v2>> \in votes[a3]
        <5>1. VotedFor(a3, b, v2) BY <4>6 DEF VotedFor
        <5>2. QED BY <5>1, <4>4 DEF OneValuePerBallot, Inv
      <4>7. QED BY <4>1, <4>5, <4>6
    <3>10. CASE a1 # a3 /\ a2 # a3
      <4>1. votes'[a1] = votes[a1] BY <3>6, <3>10
      <4>2. votes'[a2] = votes[a2] BY <3>6, <3>10
      <4>3. VotedFor(a1, b, v1) BY <4>1 DEF VotedFor
      <4>4. VotedFor(a2, b, v2) BY <4>2 DEF VotedFor
      <4>5. QED BY <4>3, <4>4 DEF OneValuePerBallot, Inv
    <3>11. QED BY <3>7, <3>8, <3>9, <3>10
  <2>4. QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3
<1>4. QED BY <1>2, <1>3 DEF vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* VotesSafe preservation

LEMMA VotesSafe_Step ==
  ASSUME Inv, [Next]_vars
  PROVE  VotesSafe'
PROOF
<1>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value,
                      VotedFor(a, b, v)'
               PROVE  SafeAt(b, v)'
  BY DEF VotesSafe
<1>2. CASE UNCHANGED vars
  <2>1. votes' = votes BY <1>2 DEF vars
  <2>2. VotedFor(a, b, v) BY <2>1 DEF VotedFor
  <2>3. SafeAt(b, v) BY <2>2 DEF VotesSafe, Inv
  <2>4. TypeOK BY DEF Inv
  <2>5. QED BY <2>3, <2>4, <1>2, SafeAt_Step
<1>3. CASE Next
  <2>1. PICK a3 \in Acceptor, b3 \in Ballot :
          \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a3, b3)
          \/ \E v3 \in Value : VoteFor(a3, b3, v3)
    BY <1>3 DEF Next
  <2>2. CASE IncreaseMaxBal(a3, b3)
    <3>1. votes' = votes BY <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
    <3>2. VotedFor(a, b, v) BY <3>1 DEF VotedFor
    <3>3. SafeAt(b, v) BY <3>2 DEF VotesSafe, Inv
    <3>4. TypeOK BY DEF Inv
    <3>5. [Next]_vars BY <1>3
    <3>6. QED BY <3>3, <3>4, <3>5, SafeAt_Step
  <2>3. CASE \E v3 \in Value : VoteFor(a3, b3, v3)
    <3>1. PICK v3 \in Value : VoteFor(a3, b3, v3) BY <2>3
    <3>2. votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a3] = votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>}]
      BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
    <3>3. \E Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, b3, v3) BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
    <3>4. votes'[a3] = votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>}
      BY <3>2 DEF TypeOK, Inv
    <3>5. \A x \in Acceptor \ {a3} : votes'[x] = votes[x]
      BY <3>2 DEF TypeOK, Inv
    <3>6. CASE a = a3
      <4>1. <<b, v>> \in votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>} BY <3>4, <3>6 DEF VotedFor
      <4>2. CASE <<b, v>> = <<b3, v3>>
        <5>1. b = b3 BY <4>2
        <5>2. v = v3 BY <4>2
        <5>3. PICK Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, b3, v3) BY <3>3
        <5>4. SafeAt(b3, v3) BY <5>3, ShowsSafety
        <5>5. SafeAt(b, v) BY <5>1, <5>2, <5>4
        <5>6. TypeOK BY DEF Inv
        <5>7. QED BY <5>5, <5>6, <1>3, SafeAt_Step
      <4>3. CASE <<b, v>> \in votes[a3]
        <5>1. VotedFor(a3, b, v) BY <4>3 DEF VotedFor
        <5>2. SafeAt(b, v) BY <5>1 DEF VotesSafe, Inv
        <5>3. TypeOK BY DEF Inv
        <5>4. QED BY <5>2, <5>3, <1>3, SafeAt_Step
      <4>4. QED BY <4>1, <4>2, <4>3
    <3>7. CASE a # a3
      <4>1. votes'[a] = votes[a] BY <3>5, <3>7
      <4>2. <<b, v>> \in votes[a] BY <4>1 DEF VotedFor
      <4>3. VotedFor(a, b, v) BY <4>2 DEF VotedFor
      <4>4. SafeAt(b, v) BY <4>3 DEF VotesSafe, Inv
      <4>5. TypeOK BY DEF Inv
      <4>6. QED BY <4>4, <4>5, <1>3, SafeAt_Step
    <3>8. QED BY <3>6, <3>7
  <2>4. QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3
<1>4. QED BY <1>2, <1>3 DEF vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Inv is preserved by Next

LEMMA Inv_Step ==
  ASSUME Inv, [Next]_vars
  PROVE  Inv'
PROOF
<1>1. TypeOK BY DEF Inv
<1>2. TypeOK' BY <1>1, TypeOK_Step
<1>3. VotesSafe' BY VotesSafe_Step
<1>4. OneValuePerBallot' BY OneValuePerBallot_Step
<1>5. QED BY <1>2, <1>3, <1>4 DEF Inv

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Spec implies always Inv

LEMMA Spec_Inv == Spec => []Inv
PROOF
<1>1. Init => Inv BY InitInv
<1>2. Inv /\ [Next]_vars => Inv' BY Inv_Step
<1>3. QED BY <1>1, <1>2, PTL DEF Spec, vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* OneVote follows from OneValuePerBallot

LEMMA OneVote_Lemma ==
  ASSUME Inv,
         NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW b \in Ballot,
         NEW v \in Value, NEW w \in Value,
         VotedFor(a, b, v), VotedFor(a, b, w)
  PROVE  v = w
  BY DEF OneValuePerBallot, Inv

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Under Inv, chosen has at most one element

LEMMA Inv_ChosenSingleton ==
  ASSUME Inv,
         NEW v1 \in chosen, NEW v2 \in chosen
  PROVE  v1 = v2
PROOF
<1>1. v1 \in Value /\ v2 \in Value BY DEF chosen
<1>2. PICK b1 \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b1, v1) BY DEF chosen
<1>3. PICK b2 \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b2, v2) BY DEF chosen
<1>4. PICK Q1 \in Quorum : \A a \in Q1 : VotedFor(a, b1, v1) BY <1>2 DEF ChosenAt
<1>5. PICK Q2 \in Quorum : \A a \in Q2 : VotedFor(a, b2, v2) BY <1>3 DEF ChosenAt
<1>6. CASE b1 = b2
  <2>1. Q1 \cap Q2 # {} BY QuorumAssumption
  <2>2. PICK a \in Q1 \cap Q2 : TRUE BY <2>1
  <2>3. VotedFor(a, b1, v1) BY <1>4, <2>2
  <2>4. VotedFor(a, b2, v2) BY <1>5, <2>2
  <2>5. VotedFor(a, b1, v2) BY <2>4, <1>6
  <2>6. a \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption, <2>2
  <2>7. QED BY <2>3, <2>5, <2>6, OneVote_Lemma, <1>1
<1>7. CASE b1 # b2
  <2>1. CASE b1 < b2
    <3>1. Q2 # {} BY QuorumNonEmpty
    <3>2. PICK a \in Q2 : VotedFor(a, b2, v2) BY <1>5, <3>1
    <3>3. a \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption
    <3>4. SafeAt(b2, v2) BY <3>2, <3>3 DEF VotesSafe, Inv
    <3>5. b1 \in 0..(b2 - 1) BY <2>1 DEF Ballot
    <3>6. NoneOtherChoosableAt(b1, v2) BY <3>4, <3>5 DEF SafeAt
    <3>7. PICK Q3 \in Quorum :
           \A a3 \in Q3 : VotedFor(a3, b1, v2) \/ CannotVoteAt(a3, b1)
      BY <3>6 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
    <3>8. Q1 \cap Q3 # {} BY QuorumAssumption
    <3>9. PICK x \in Q1 \cap Q3 : TRUE BY <3>8
    <3>10. x \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption, <3>9
    <3>11. VotedFor(x, b1, v1) BY <1>4, <3>9
    <3>12. VotedFor(x, b1, v2) \/ CannotVoteAt(x, b1) BY <3>7, <3>9
    <3>13. ~ CannotVoteAt(x, b1)
      <4>1. ~ DidNotVoteAt(x, b1)
        <5>1. ASSUME DidNotVoteAt(x, b1) PROVE FALSE
          <6>1. ~ VotedFor(x, b1, v1) BY <5>1 DEF DidNotVoteAt
          <6>2. QED BY <6>1, <3>11
        <5>2. QED BY <5>1
      <4>2. QED BY <4>1 DEF CannotVoteAt
    <3>14. VotedFor(x, b1, v2) BY <3>12, <3>13
    <3>15. QED BY <3>11, <3>14, <3>10, OneVote_Lemma, <1>1
  <2>2. CASE b2 < b1
    <3>1. Q1 # {} BY QuorumNonEmpty
    <3>2. PICK a \in Q1 : VotedFor(a, b1, v1) BY <1>4, <3>1
    <3>3. a \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption
    <3>4. SafeAt(b1, v1) BY <3>2, <3>3 DEF VotesSafe, Inv
    <3>5. b2 \in 0..(b1 - 1) BY <2>2 DEF Ballot
    <3>6. NoneOtherChoosableAt(b2, v1) BY <3>4, <3>5 DEF SafeAt
    <3>7. PICK Q3 \in Quorum :
           \A a3 \in Q3 : VotedFor(a3, b2, v1) \/ CannotVoteAt(a3, b2)
      BY <3>6 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
    <3>8. Q2 \cap Q3 # {} BY QuorumAssumption
    <3>9. PICK x \in Q2 \cap Q3 : TRUE BY <3>8
    <3>10. x \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption, <3>9
    <3>11. VotedFor(x, b2, v2) BY <1>5, <3>9
    <3>12. VotedFor(x, b2, v1) \/ CannotVoteAt(x, b2) BY <3>7, <3>9
    <3>13. ~ CannotVoteAt(x, b2)
      <4>1. ~ DidNotVoteAt(x, b2)
        <5>1. ASSUME DidNotVoteAt(x, b2) PROVE FALSE
          <6>1. ~ VotedFor(x, b2, v2) BY <5>1 DEF DidNotVoteAt
          <6>2. QED BY <6>1, <3>11
        <5>2. QED BY <5>1
      <4>2. QED BY <4>1 DEF CannotVoteAt
    <3>14. VotedFor(x, b2, v1) BY <3>12, <3>13
    <3>15. QED BY <3>11, <3>14, <3>10, OneVote_Lemma, <1>1
  <2>3. QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <1>7 DEF Ballot
<1>8. QED BY <1>6, <1>7

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Refinement step: under invariants, [Next]_vars implies [C!Next]_chosen

LEMMA Refinement_Step ==
  ASSUME Inv, Inv', [Next]_vars
  PROVE  [C!Next]_chosen
PROOF
<1>1. SUFFICES ASSUME chosen' # chosen
               PROVE  C!Next
  BY DEF C!Next
<1>2. TypeOK BY DEF Inv
<1>3. chosen \subseteq chosen' BY Chosen_Monotone, <1>2
<1>4. chosen' \ chosen # {}
  <2>1. ASSUME chosen' \ chosen = {} PROVE FALSE
    <3>1. chosen' \subseteq chosen BY <2>1
    <3>2. chosen' = chosen BY <3>1, <1>3
    <3>3. QED BY <3>2, <1>1
  <2>2. QED BY <2>1
<1>5. PICK v \in chosen' \ chosen : TRUE BY <1>4
<1>6. v \in chosen' BY <1>5
<1>7. v \notin chosen BY <1>5
<1>8. v \in Value BY <1>6 DEF chosen
<1>9. chosen = {}
  <2>1. ASSUME chosen # {} PROVE FALSE
    <3>1. PICK w \in chosen : TRUE BY <2>1
    <3>2. w \in chosen' BY <3>1, <1>3
    <3>3. v = w BY <1>6, <3>2, Inv_ChosenSingleton, Inv'
    \* Wait, Inv_ChosenSingleton uses Inv. We need both v, w \in chosen' under Inv'.
    \* Hmm. Actually we need v \in chosen' \ chosen, so v \in chosen'.
    \* w \in chosen. Then under Inv, v could not be in chosen, so v # w (since w \in chosen, v \notin chosen).
    \* Under Inv', v, w \in chosen', so v = w. Contradiction.
    <3>4. v # w BY <1>7, <3>1
    <3>5. QED BY <3>3, <3>4
  <2>2. QED BY <2>1
<1>10. chosen' = {v}
  <2>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW w \in chosen', w # v PROVE FALSE
    BY <1>6
  <2>2. v = w BY <1>6, <2>1, Inv_ChosenSingleton, Inv'
  <2>3. QED BY <2>1, <2>2
<1>11. \E v0 \in Value : chosen' = {v0} BY <1>8, <1>10
<1>12. QED BY <1>9, <1>11 DEF C!Next

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Main refinement theorem

THEOREM Refinement == Spec => C!Spec
PROOF
<1>1. Init => C!Init BY InitChosenEmpty DEF C!Init
<1>2. Inv /\ Inv' /\ [Next]_vars => [C!Next]_chosen BY Refinement_Step
<1>3. Spec => []Inv BY Spec_Inv
<1>4. Spec => [][Next]_vars BY PTL DEF Spec, vars
<1>5. Spec => Init BY PTL DEF Spec
<1>6. QED BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, <1>4, <1>5, PTL DEF Spec, C!Spec
=============================================================================

tool_use_result.content:
------------------------------- MODULE Voting_Refinement -------------------------------
EXTENDS FiniteSets, TLAPS, Integers
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
CONSTANT Value, Acceptor, Quorum

ASSUME QuorumAssumption ==
    /\ \A Q \in Quorum : Q \subseteq Acceptor
    /\ \A Q1, Q2 \in Quorum : Q1 \cap Q2 # {}

Ballot == Nat
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VARIABLES votes, maxBal

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
VotedFor(a, b, v) == <<b, v>> \in votes[a]

DidNotVoteAt(a, b) == \A v \in Value : ~ VotedFor(a, b, v)

ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v) ==
  /\ \A a \in Q : maxBal[a] \geq b
  /\ \E c \in -1..(b-1) :
      /\ (c # -1) => \E a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c, v)
      /\ \A d \in (c+1)..(b-1), a \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(a, d)
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Init ==
    /\ votes = [a \in Acceptor |-> {}]
    /\ maxBal = [a \in Acceptor |-> -1]

IncreaseMaxBal(a, b) ==
  /\ b > maxBal[a]
  /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = b]
  /\ UNCHANGED votes

VoteFor(a, b, v) ==
    /\ maxBal[a] <= b
    /\ \A vt \in votes[a] : vt[1] # b
    /\ \A c \in Acceptor \ {a} :
         \A vt \in votes[c] : (vt[1] = b) => (vt[2] = v)
    /\ \E Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v)
    /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a] = votes[a] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
    /\ maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = b]
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
Next ==
    \E a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot :
        \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a, b)
        \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(a, b, v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<votes, maxBal>>
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
ChosenAt(b, v) ==
    \E Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)

chosen == {v \in Value : \E b \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b, v)}

---------------------------------------------------------------------------

vars == <<votes, maxBal>>

TypeOK == /\ votes \in [Acceptor -> SUBSET (Ballot \X Value)]
          /\ maxBal \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]

CannotVoteAt(a, b) ==
    /\ maxBal[a] > b
    /\ DidNotVoteAt(a, b)

NoneOtherChoosableAt(b, v) ==
    \E Q \in Quorum :
        \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, b)

SafeAt(b, v) ==
    \A c \in 0..(b-1) : NoneOtherChoosableAt(c, v)

VotesSafe ==
    \A a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v \in Value :
        VotedFor(a, b, v) => SafeAt(b, v)

OneValuePerBallot ==
    \A a1, a2 \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot, v1, v2 \in Value :
        VotedFor(a1, b, v1) /\ VotedFor(a2, b, v2) => (v1 = v2)

Inv == TypeOK /\ VotesSafe /\ OneValuePerBallot

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

C == INSTANCE Consensus

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------

LEMMA QuorumNonEmpty == \A Q \in Quorum : Q # {}
  BY QuorumAssumption

LEMMA InitTypeOK == Init => TypeOK
  BY DEF Init, TypeOK, Ballot

LEMMA InitVotesSafe == Init => VotesSafe
  BY DEF Init, VotesSafe, VotedFor

LEMMA InitOneValuePerBallot == Init => OneValuePerBallot
  BY DEF Init, OneValuePerBallot, VotedFor

LEMMA InitInv == Init => Inv
  BY InitTypeOK, InitVotesSafe, InitOneValuePerBallot DEF Inv

LEMMA InitChosenEmpty == Init => chosen = {}
  BY DEF Init, chosen, ChosenAt, VotedFor, Ballot

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Action-level helpers

LEMMA TypeOK_Step ==
  ASSUME TypeOK, [Next]_vars
  PROVE  TypeOK'
PROOF
<1>1. CASE UNCHANGED vars
  BY <1>1 DEF TypeOK, vars
<1>2. CASE Next
  <2>1. PICK a \in Acceptor, b \in Ballot :
          \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a, b)
          \/ \E v \in Value : VoteFor(a, b, v)
    BY <1>2 DEF Next
  <2>2. CASE IncreaseMaxBal(a, b)
    <3>1. votes' = votes BY <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
    <3>2. maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = b] BY <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
    <3>3. b \in Ballot \cup {-1} BY DEF Ballot
    <3>4. maxBal' \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]
      BY <3>2, <3>3 DEF TypeOK
    <3>5. QED BY <3>1, <3>4 DEF TypeOK
  <2>3. CASE \E v \in Value : VoteFor(a, b, v)
    <3>1. PICK v \in Value : VoteFor(a, b, v) BY <2>3
    <3>2. votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a] = votes[a] \cup {<<b, v>>}]
      BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
    <3>3. maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a] = b]
      BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
    <3>4. votes[a] \in SUBSET (Ballot \X Value) BY DEF TypeOK
    <3>5. <<b, v>> \in Ballot \X Value BY DEF Ballot
    <3>6. votes[a] \cup {<<b, v>>} \in SUBSET (Ballot \X Value)
      BY <3>4, <3>5
    <3>7. votes' \in [Acceptor -> SUBSET (Ballot \X Value)]
      BY <3>2, <3>6 DEF TypeOK
    <3>8. b \in Ballot \cup {-1} BY DEF Ballot
    <3>9. maxBal' \in [Acceptor -> Ballot \cup {-1}]
      BY <3>3, <3>8 DEF TypeOK
    <3>10. QED BY <3>7, <3>9 DEF TypeOK
  <2>4. QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3
<1>3. QED BY <1>1, <1>2 DEF vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Monotonicity of votes

LEMMA Votes_Monotone ==
  ASSUME TypeOK, [Next]_vars,
         NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value,
         VotedFor(a, b, v)
  PROVE  VotedFor(a, b, v)'
PROOF
<1>1. CASE UNCHANGED vars
  BY <1>1 DEF vars, VotedFor
<1>2. CASE Next
  <2>1. PICK a2 \in Acceptor, b2 \in Ballot :
          \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a2, b2)
          \/ \E v2 \in Value : VoteFor(a2, b2, v2)
    BY <1>2 DEF Next
  <2>2. CASE IncreaseMaxBal(a2, b2)
    BY <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal, VotedFor
  <2>3. CASE \E v2 \in Value : VoteFor(a2, b2, v2)
    <3>1. PICK v2 \in Value : VoteFor(a2, b2, v2) BY <2>3
    <3>2. votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a2] = votes[a2] \cup {<<b2, v2>>}]
      BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
    <3>3. <<b, v>> \in votes[a] BY DEF VotedFor
    <3>4. CASE a = a2
      <4>1. votes'[a] = votes[a] \cup {<<b2, v2>>}
        BY <3>2, <3>4 DEF TypeOK
      <4>2. QED BY <3>3, <4>1 DEF VotedFor
    <3>5. CASE a # a2
      <4>1. votes'[a] = votes[a]
        BY <3>2, <3>5 DEF TypeOK
      <4>2. QED BY <3>3, <4>1 DEF VotedFor
    <3>6. QED BY <3>4, <3>5
  <2>4. QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3
<1>3. QED BY <1>1, <1>2

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Chosen is monotonic

LEMMA Chosen_Monotone ==
  ASSUME TypeOK, [Next]_vars
  PROVE  chosen \subseteq chosen'
PROOF
<1>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW v \in chosen
               PROVE  v \in chosen'
  OBVIOUS
<1>2. v \in Value /\ \E b \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b, v) BY DEF chosen
<1>3. PICK b \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b, v) BY <1>2
<1>4. PICK Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v) BY <1>3 DEF ChosenAt
<1>5. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, b, v)'
  <2>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Q PROVE VotedFor(a, b, v)'
    OBVIOUS
  <2>2. a \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption
  <2>3. VotedFor(a, b, v) BY <1>4
  <2>4. QED BY Votes_Monotone, <2>2, <2>3
<1>6. ChosenAt(b, v)' BY <1>5 DEF ChosenAt
<1>7. QED BY <1>2, <1>3, <1>6 DEF chosen

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* SafeAt stability

LEMMA SafeAt_Step ==
  ASSUME TypeOK, [Next]_vars,
         NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value,
         SafeAt(b, v)
  PROVE  SafeAt(b, v)'
PROOF
<1>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW c \in 0..(b-1)
               PROVE  NoneOtherChoosableAt(c, v)'
  BY DEF SafeAt
<1>2. NoneOtherChoosableAt(c, v) BY DEF SafeAt
<1>3. PICK Q \in Quorum : \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, c)
  BY <1>2 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
<1>4. c \in Ballot BY DEF Ballot
<1>5. \A a \in Q : VotedFor(a, c, v)' \/ CannotVoteAt(a, c)'
  <2>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Q
                 PROVE  VotedFor(a, c, v)' \/ CannotVoteAt(a, c)'
    OBVIOUS
  <2>2. a \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption
  <2>3. VotedFor(a, c, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(a, c) BY <1>3
  <2>4. CASE VotedFor(a, c, v)
    <3>1. VotedFor(a, c, v)' BY <2>2, <1>4, Votes_Monotone, <2>4
    <3>2. QED BY <3>1
  <2>5. CASE CannotVoteAt(a, c)
    <3>1. maxBal[a] > c /\ DidNotVoteAt(a, c) BY <2>5 DEF CannotVoteAt
    <3>2. maxBal[a] \in Ballot \cup {-1} BY <2>2 DEF TypeOK
    <3>3. maxBal[a] \in Int BY <3>2 DEF Ballot
    <3>4. CASE UNCHANGED vars
      <4>1. maxBal[a]' = maxBal[a] BY <3>4 DEF vars
      <4>2. votes[a]' = votes[a] BY <3>4 DEF vars
      <4>3. DidNotVoteAt(a, c)' BY <3>1, <4>2 DEF DidNotVoteAt, VotedFor
      <4>4. maxBal[a]' > c BY <3>1, <4>1
      <4>5. QED BY <4>3, <4>4 DEF CannotVoteAt
    <3>5. CASE Next
      <4>1. PICK a2 \in Acceptor, b2 \in Ballot :
              \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a2, b2)
              \/ \E v2 \in Value : VoteFor(a2, b2, v2)
        BY <3>5 DEF Next
      <4>2. CASE IncreaseMaxBal(a2, b2)
        <5>1. votes' = votes BY <4>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
        <5>2. DidNotVoteAt(a, c)'
          BY <3>1, <5>1 DEF DidNotVoteAt, VotedFor
        <5>3. CASE a = a2
          <6>1. maxBal[a2]' = b2 BY <4>2, <5>3 DEF IncreaseMaxBal, TypeOK
          <6>2. maxBal[a]' = b2 BY <5>3, <6>1
          <6>3. b2 \in Ballot BY DEF Ballot
          <6>4. b2 > maxBal[a2] BY <4>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
          <6>5. b2 > maxBal[a] BY <5>3, <6>4
          <6>6. maxBal[a]' > c BY <6>2, <6>5, <3>1, <3>3, <6>3 DEF Ballot
          <6>7. QED BY <5>2, <6>6 DEF CannotVoteAt
        <5>4. CASE a # a2
          <6>1. maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a2] = b2] BY <4>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
          <6>2. maxBal[a]' = maxBal[a] BY <5>4, <6>1 DEF TypeOK
          <6>3. QED BY <5>2, <6>2, <3>1 DEF CannotVoteAt
        <5>5. QED BY <5>3, <5>4
      <4>3. CASE \E v2 \in Value : VoteFor(a2, b2, v2)
        <5>1. PICK v2 \in Value : VoteFor(a2, b2, v2) BY <4>3
        <5>2. votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a2] = votes[a2] \cup {<<b2, v2>>}]
          BY <5>1 DEF VoteFor
        <5>3. maxBal' = [maxBal EXCEPT ![a2] = b2]
          BY <5>1 DEF VoteFor
        <5>4. maxBal[a2] <= b2 BY <5>1 DEF VoteFor
        <5>5. CASE a = a2
          <6>1. maxBal[a]' = b2 BY <5>3, <5>5 DEF TypeOK
          <6>2. votes[a]' = votes[a] \cup {<<b2, v2>>} BY <5>2, <5>5 DEF TypeOK
          <6>3. b2 \in Ballot BY DEF Ballot
          <6>4. maxBal[a] <= b2 BY <5>4, <5>5
          <6>5. c < b2
            <7>1. c < maxBal[a] BY <3>1, <3>3, <6>3 DEF Ballot
            <7>2. QED BY <6>4, <7>1, <3>3, <6>3 DEF Ballot
          <6>6. b2 > c BY <6>5
          <6>7. maxBal[a]' > c BY <6>1, <6>6
          <6>8. DidNotVoteAt(a, c)'
            <7>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW v3 \in Value
                           PROVE  ~ VotedFor(a, c, v3)'
              BY DEF DidNotVoteAt
            <7>2. ~ VotedFor(a, c, v3) BY <3>1 DEF DidNotVoteAt
            <7>3. <<c, v3>> \notin votes[a] BY <7>2 DEF VotedFor
            <7>4. c # b2 BY <6>5
            <7>5. <<c, v3>> # <<b2, v2>> BY <7>4
            <7>6. <<c, v3>> \notin votes[a] \cup {<<b2, v2>>} BY <7>3, <7>5
            <7>7. <<c, v3>> \notin votes'[a] BY <7>6, <6>2
            <7>8. QED BY <7>7 DEF VotedFor
          <6>9. QED BY <6>7, <6>8 DEF CannotVoteAt
        <5>6. CASE a # a2
          <6>1. maxBal[a]' = maxBal[a] BY <5>3, <5>6 DEF TypeOK
          <6>2. votes[a]' = votes[a] BY <5>2, <5>6 DEF TypeOK
          <6>3. DidNotVoteAt(a, c)' BY <3>1, <6>2 DEF DidNotVoteAt, VotedFor
          <6>4. QED BY <6>1, <6>3, <3>1 DEF CannotVoteAt
        <5>7. QED BY <5>5, <5>6
      <4>4. QED BY <4>1, <4>2, <4>3
    <3>6. QED BY <3>4, <3>5 DEF vars
  <2>6. QED BY <2>3, <2>4, <2>5
<1>6. QED BY <1>5 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* AllSafeAtZero: any value is safe at ballot 0

LEMMA AllSafeAtZero == \A v \in Value : SafeAt(0, v)
PROOF
<1>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW v \in Value
               PROVE  SafeAt(0, v)
  OBVIOUS
<1>2. 0..(0-1) = {}
  OBVIOUS
<1>3. QED BY <1>2 DEF SafeAt

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* ShowsSafety: ShowsSafeAt implies SafeAt under Inv

LEMMA ShowsSafety ==
  ASSUME Inv,
         NEW Q \in Quorum, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value,
         ShowsSafeAt(Q, b, v)
  PROVE  SafeAt(b, v)
PROOF
<1>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW d \in 0..(b-1)
               PROVE  NoneOtherChoosableAt(d, v)
  BY DEF SafeAt
<1>2. PICK c \in -1..(b-1) :
        /\ (c # -1) => \E aa \in Q : VotedFor(aa, c, v)
        /\ \A dd \in (c+1)..(b-1), aa \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(aa, dd)
  BY DEF ShowsSafeAt
<1>3. \A aa \in Q : maxBal[aa] \geq b BY DEF ShowsSafeAt
<1>4. b \in Nat BY DEF Ballot
<1>5. c \in Int /\ c >= -1 /\ c <= b - 1
  BY <1>4
<1>6. d \in Int /\ d >= 0 /\ d <= b - 1
  BY <1>4
<1>7. CASE d = c
  <2>1. c # -1 BY <1>7, <1>6
  <2>2. PICK aa \in Q : VotedFor(aa, c, v) BY <1>2, <2>1
  <2>3. VotedFor(aa, d, v) BY <2>2, <1>7
  <2>4. \E QQ \in Quorum : \A x \in QQ : VotedFor(x, d, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(x, d)
    <3>1. \A x \in Q : VotedFor(x, d, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(x, d)
      <4>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW x \in Q
                     PROVE  VotedFor(x, d, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(x, d)
        OBVIOUS
      <4>2. x \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption
      <4>3. CASE x = aa
        BY <2>3, <4>3
      <4>4. CASE x # aa
        <5>1. CASE DidNotVoteAt(x, d)
          <6>1. maxBal[x] \geq b BY <1>3
          <6>2. b > d
            <7>1. d \in Nat BY <1>6
            <7>2. d < b BY <1>6
            <7>3. QED BY <7>1, <7>2, <1>4
          <6>3. maxBal[x] \in Ballot \cup {-1} BY <4>2 DEF TypeOK, Inv
          <6>4. maxBal[x] > d BY <6>1, <6>2, <6>3 DEF Ballot
          <6>5. QED BY <6>4, <5>1 DEF CannotVoteAt
        <5>2. CASE ~ DidNotVoteAt(x, d)
          <6>1. \E vv \in Value : VotedFor(x, d, vv) BY <5>2 DEF DidNotVoteAt
          <6>2. PICK vv \in Value : VotedFor(x, d, vv) BY <6>1
          <6>3. VotedFor(aa, d, v) BY <2>3
          <6>4. aa \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption
          <6>5. d \in Ballot BY <1>6 DEF Ballot
          <6>6. vv = v BY <6>2, <6>3, <4>2, <6>4, <6>5 DEF OneValuePerBallot, Inv
          <6>7. VotedFor(x, d, v) BY <6>2, <6>6
          <6>8. QED BY <6>7
        <5>3. QED BY <5>1, <5>2
      <4>5. QED BY <4>3, <4>4
    <3>2. QED BY <3>1
  <2>5. QED BY <2>4 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
<1>8. CASE d # c
  <2>1. d \in 0..(b-1) BY <1>6
  <2>2. CASE d \in (c+1)..(b-1)
    <3>1. \A aa \in Q : DidNotVoteAt(aa, d) BY <2>2, <1>2
    <3>2. \E QQ \in Quorum : \A aa \in QQ : VotedFor(aa, d, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(aa, d)
      <4>1. \A aa \in Q : VotedFor(aa, d, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(aa, d)
        <5>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW aa \in Q
                       PROVE  VotedFor(aa, d, v) \/ CannotVoteAt(aa, d)
          OBVIOUS
        <5>2. aa \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption
        <5>3. DidNotVoteAt(aa, d) BY <3>1
        <5>4. maxBal[aa] \geq b BY <1>3
        <5>5. b > d
          <6>1. d \in Nat BY <1>6
          <6>2. d < b BY <1>6
          <6>3. QED BY <6>1, <6>2, <1>4
        <5>6. maxBal[aa] \in Ballot \cup {-1} BY <5>2 DEF TypeOK, Inv
        <5>7. maxBal[aa] > d BY <5>4, <5>5, <5>6 DEF Ballot
        <5>8. CannotVoteAt(aa, d) BY <5>3, <5>7 DEF CannotVoteAt
        <5>9. QED BY <5>8
      <4>2. QED BY <4>1
    <3>3. QED BY <3>2 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
  <2>3. CASE d \notin (c+1)..(b-1)
    \* Then d < c+1, so d <= c, so (since d # c) d < c. We need c \in 0..(b-1) and use VotesSafe of aa.
    <3>1. d < c+1 BY <2>3, <2>1, <1>5
    <3>2. d <= c BY <3>1
    <3>3. d < c BY <3>2, <1>8
    <3>4. c # -1 BY <3>3, <1>6
    <3>5. c \in 0..(b-1) BY <3>4, <1>5
    <3>6. PICK aa \in Q : VotedFor(aa, c, v) BY <1>2, <3>4
    <3>7. aa \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption
    <3>8. c \in Ballot BY <3>5 DEF Ballot
    <3>9. SafeAt(c, v) BY <3>6, <3>7, <3>8 DEF VotesSafe, Inv
    <3>10. d \in 0..(c-1) BY <3>3, <1>6
    <3>11. NoneOtherChoosableAt(d, v) BY <3>10, <3>9 DEF SafeAt
    <3>12. QED BY <3>11
  <2>4. QED BY <2>2, <2>3
<1>9. QED BY <1>7, <1>8

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* OneValuePerBallot preservation

LEMMA OneValuePerBallot_Step ==
  ASSUME Inv, [Next]_vars
  PROVE  OneValuePerBallot'
PROOF
<1>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a1 \in Acceptor, NEW a2 \in Acceptor,
                      NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v1 \in Value, NEW v2 \in Value,
                      VotedFor(a1, b, v1)', VotedFor(a2, b, v2)'
               PROVE  v1 = v2
  BY DEF OneValuePerBallot
<1>2. CASE UNCHANGED vars
  <2>1. votes' = votes BY <1>2 DEF vars
  <2>2. VotedFor(a1, b, v1) BY <2>1 DEF VotedFor
  <2>3. VotedFor(a2, b, v2) BY <2>1 DEF VotedFor
  <2>4. QED BY <2>2, <2>3 DEF OneValuePerBallot, Inv
<1>3. CASE Next
  <2>1. PICK a3 \in Acceptor, b3 \in Ballot :
          \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a3, b3)
          \/ \E v3 \in Value : VoteFor(a3, b3, v3)
    BY <1>3 DEF Next
  <2>2. CASE IncreaseMaxBal(a3, b3)
    <3>1. votes' = votes BY <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
    <3>2. VotedFor(a1, b, v1) BY <3>1 DEF VotedFor
    <3>3. VotedFor(a2, b, v2) BY <3>1 DEF VotedFor
    <3>4. QED BY <3>2, <3>3 DEF OneValuePerBallot, Inv
  <2>3. CASE \E v3 \in Value : VoteFor(a3, b3, v3)
    <3>1. PICK v3 \in Value : VoteFor(a3, b3, v3) BY <2>3
    <3>2. votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a3] = votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>}]
      BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
    <3>3. \A vt \in votes[a3] : vt[1] # b3 BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
    <3>4. \A c \in Acceptor \ {a3} : \A vt \in votes[c] : vt[1] = b3 => vt[2] = v3
      BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
    <3>5. votes'[a3] = votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>}
      BY <3>2 DEF TypeOK, Inv
    <3>6. \A x \in Acceptor \ {a3} : votes'[x] = votes[x]
      BY <3>2 DEF TypeOK, Inv
    <3>7. CASE a1 = a3 /\ a2 = a3
      <4>1. <<b, v1>> \in votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>} BY <3>5, <3>7 DEF VotedFor
      <4>2. <<b, v2>> \in votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>} BY <3>5, <3>7 DEF VotedFor
      <4>3. CASE <<b, v1>> = <<b3, v3>> /\ <<b, v2>> = <<b3, v3>>
        BY <4>3
      <4>4. CASE <<b, v1>> = <<b3, v3>> /\ <<b, v2>> \in votes[a3]
        <5>1. b = b3 BY <4>4
        <5>2. v1 = v3 BY <4>4
        <5>3. <<b, v2>> \in votes[a3] /\ (<<b, v2>>)[1] = b BY <4>4
        <5>4. \E vt \in votes[a3] : vt[1] = b3 BY <5>1, <5>3
        <5>5. FALSE BY <5>4, <3>3, <5>1
        <5>6. QED BY <5>5
      <4>5. CASE <<b, v1>> \in votes[a3] /\ <<b, v2>> = <<b3, v3>>
        <5>1. b = b3 BY <4>5
        <5>2. <<b, v1>> \in votes[a3] /\ (<<b, v1>>)[1] = b BY <4>5
        <5>3. FALSE BY <5>2, <3>3, <5>1
        <5>4. QED BY <5>3
      <4>6. CASE <<b, v1>> \in votes[a3] /\ <<b, v2>> \in votes[a3]
        <5>1. VotedFor(a3, b, v1) BY <4>6 DEF VotedFor
        <5>2. VotedFor(a3, b, v2) BY <4>6 DEF VotedFor
        <5>3. QED BY <5>1, <5>2 DEF OneValuePerBallot, Inv
      <4>7. QED BY <4>1, <4>2, <4>3, <4>4, <4>5, <4>6
    <3>8. CASE a1 = a3 /\ a2 # a3
      <4>1. <<b, v1>> \in votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>} BY <3>5, <3>8 DEF VotedFor
      <4>2. votes'[a2] = votes[a2] BY <3>6, <3>8
      <4>3. <<b, v2>> \in votes[a2] BY <4>2 DEF VotedFor
      <4>4. VotedFor(a2, b, v2) BY <4>3 DEF VotedFor
      <4>5. CASE <<b, v1>> = <<b3, v3>>
        <5>1. b = b3 BY <4>5
        <5>2. v1 = v3 BY <4>5
        <5>3. (<<b, v2>>)[1] = b3 BY <5>1
        <5>4. (<<b, v2>>)[2] = v3 BY <3>4, <4>3, <3>8, <5>3
        <5>5. v2 = v3 BY <5>4
        <5>6. QED BY <5>2, <5>5
      <4>6. CASE <<b, v1>> \in votes[a3]
        <5>1. VotedFor(a3, b, v1) BY <4>6 DEF VotedFor
        <5>2. QED BY <5>1, <4>4 DEF OneValuePerBallot, Inv
      <4>7. QED BY <4>1, <4>5, <4>6
    <3>9. CASE a1 # a3 /\ a2 = a3
      <4>1. <<b, v2>> \in votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>} BY <3>5, <3>9 DEF VotedFor
      <4>2. votes'[a1] = votes[a1] BY <3>6, <3>9
      <4>3. <<b, v1>> \in votes[a1] BY <4>2 DEF VotedFor
      <4>4. VotedFor(a1, b, v1) BY <4>3 DEF VotedFor
      <4>5. CASE <<b, v2>> = <<b3, v3>>
        <5>1. b = b3 BY <4>5
        <5>2. v2 = v3 BY <4>5
        <5>3. (<<b, v1>>)[1] = b3 BY <5>1
        <5>4. (<<b, v1>>)[2] = v3 BY <3>4, <4>3, <3>9, <5>3
        <5>5. v1 = v3 BY <5>4
        <5>6. QED BY <5>2, <5>5
      <4>6. CASE <<b, v2>> \in votes[a3]
        <5>1. VotedFor(a3, b, v2) BY <4>6 DEF VotedFor
        <5>2. QED BY <5>1, <4>4 DEF OneValuePerBallot, Inv
      <4>7. QED BY <4>1, <4>5, <4>6
    <3>10. CASE a1 # a3 /\ a2 # a3
      <4>1. votes'[a1] = votes[a1] BY <3>6, <3>10
      <4>2. votes'[a2] = votes[a2] BY <3>6, <3>10
      <4>3. VotedFor(a1, b, v1) BY <4>1 DEF VotedFor
      <4>4. VotedFor(a2, b, v2) BY <4>2 DEF VotedFor
      <4>5. QED BY <4>3, <4>4 DEF OneValuePerBallot, Inv
    <3>11. QED BY <3>7, <3>8, <3>9, <3>10
  <2>4. QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3
<1>4. QED BY <1>2, <1>3 DEF vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* VotesSafe preservation

LEMMA VotesSafe_Step ==
  ASSUME Inv, [Next]_vars
  PROVE  VotesSafe'
PROOF
<1>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW b \in Ballot, NEW v \in Value,
                      VotedFor(a, b, v)'
               PROVE  SafeAt(b, v)'
  BY DEF VotesSafe
<1>2. CASE UNCHANGED vars
  <2>1. votes' = votes BY <1>2 DEF vars
  <2>2. VotedFor(a, b, v) BY <2>1 DEF VotedFor
  <2>3. SafeAt(b, v) BY <2>2 DEF VotesSafe, Inv
  <2>4. TypeOK BY DEF Inv
  <2>5. QED BY <2>3, <2>4, <1>2, SafeAt_Step
<1>3. CASE Next
  <2>1. PICK a3 \in Acceptor, b3 \in Ballot :
          \/ IncreaseMaxBal(a3, b3)
          \/ \E v3 \in Value : VoteFor(a3, b3, v3)
    BY <1>3 DEF Next
  <2>2. CASE IncreaseMaxBal(a3, b3)
    <3>1. votes' = votes BY <2>2 DEF IncreaseMaxBal
    <3>2. VotedFor(a, b, v) BY <3>1 DEF VotedFor
    <3>3. SafeAt(b, v) BY <3>2 DEF VotesSafe, Inv
    <3>4. TypeOK BY DEF Inv
    <3>5. [Next]_vars BY <1>3
    <3>6. QED BY <3>3, <3>4, <3>5, SafeAt_Step
  <2>3. CASE \E v3 \in Value : VoteFor(a3, b3, v3)
    <3>1. PICK v3 \in Value : VoteFor(a3, b3, v3) BY <2>3
    <3>2. votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![a3] = votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>}]
      BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
    <3>3. \E Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, b3, v3) BY <3>1 DEF VoteFor
    <3>4. votes'[a3] = votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>}
      BY <3>2 DEF TypeOK, Inv
    <3>5. \A x \in Acceptor \ {a3} : votes'[x] = votes[x]
      BY <3>2 DEF TypeOK, Inv
    <3>6. CASE a = a3
      <4>1. <<b, v>> \in votes[a3] \cup {<<b3, v3>>} BY <3>4, <3>6 DEF VotedFor
      <4>2. CASE <<b, v>> = <<b3, v3>>
        <5>1. b = b3 BY <4>2
        <5>2. v = v3 BY <4>2
        <5>3. PICK Q \in Quorum : ShowsSafeAt(Q, b3, v3) BY <3>3
        <5>4. SafeAt(b3, v3) BY <5>3, ShowsSafety
        <5>5. SafeAt(b, v) BY <5>1, <5>2, <5>4
        <5>6. TypeOK BY DEF Inv
        <5>7. QED BY <5>5, <5>6, <1>3, SafeAt_Step
      <4>3. CASE <<b, v>> \in votes[a3]
        <5>1. VotedFor(a3, b, v) BY <4>3 DEF VotedFor
        <5>2. SafeAt(b, v) BY <5>1 DEF VotesSafe, Inv
        <5>3. TypeOK BY DEF Inv
        <5>4. QED BY <5>2, <5>3, <1>3, SafeAt_Step
      <4>4. QED BY <4>1, <4>2, <4>3
    <3>7. CASE a # a3
      <4>1. votes'[a] = votes[a] BY <3>5, <3>7
      <4>2. <<b, v>> \in votes[a] BY <4>1 DEF VotedFor
      <4>3. VotedFor(a, b, v) BY <4>2 DEF VotedFor
      <4>4. SafeAt(b, v) BY <4>3 DEF VotesSafe, Inv
      <4>5. TypeOK BY DEF Inv
      <4>6. QED BY <4>4, <4>5, <1>3, SafeAt_Step
    <3>8. QED BY <3>6, <3>7
  <2>4. QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <2>3
<1>4. QED BY <1>2, <1>3 DEF vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Inv is preserved by Next

LEMMA Inv_Step ==
  ASSUME Inv, [Next]_vars
  PROVE  Inv'
PROOF
<1>1. TypeOK BY DEF Inv
<1>2. TypeOK' BY <1>1, TypeOK_Step
<1>3. VotesSafe' BY VotesSafe_Step
<1>4. OneValuePerBallot' BY OneValuePerBallot_Step
<1>5. QED BY <1>2, <1>3, <1>4 DEF Inv

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Spec implies always Inv

LEMMA Spec_Inv == Spec => []Inv
PROOF
<1>1. Init => Inv BY InitInv
<1>2. Inv /\ [Next]_vars => Inv' BY Inv_Step
<1>3. QED BY <1>1, <1>2, PTL DEF Spec, vars

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* OneVote follows from OneValuePerBallot

LEMMA OneVote_Lemma ==
  ASSUME Inv,
         NEW a \in Acceptor, NEW b \in Ballot,
         NEW v \in Value, NEW w \in Value,
         VotedFor(a, b, v), VotedFor(a, b, w)
  PROVE  v = w
  BY DEF OneValuePerBallot, Inv

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Under Inv, chosen has at most one element

LEMMA Inv_ChosenSingleton ==
  ASSUME Inv,
         NEW v1 \in chosen, NEW v2 \in chosen
  PROVE  v1 = v2
PROOF
<1>1. v1 \in Value /\ v2 \in Value BY DEF chosen
<1>2. PICK b1 \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b1, v1) BY DEF chosen
<1>3. PICK b2 \in Ballot : ChosenAt(b2, v2) BY DEF chosen
<1>4. PICK Q1 \in Quorum : \A a \in Q1 : VotedFor(a, b1, v1) BY <1>2 DEF ChosenAt
<1>5. PICK Q2 \in Quorum : \A a \in Q2 : VotedFor(a, b2, v2) BY <1>3 DEF ChosenAt
<1>6. CASE b1 = b2
  <2>1. Q1 \cap Q2 # {} BY QuorumAssumption
  <2>2. PICK a \in Q1 \cap Q2 : TRUE BY <2>1
  <2>3. VotedFor(a, b1, v1) BY <1>4, <2>2
  <2>4. VotedFor(a, b2, v2) BY <1>5, <2>2
  <2>5. VotedFor(a, b1, v2) BY <2>4, <1>6
  <2>6. a \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption, <2>2
  <2>7. QED BY <2>3, <2>5, <2>6, OneVote_Lemma, <1>1
<1>7. CASE b1 # b2
  <2>1. CASE b1 < b2
    <3>1. Q2 # {} BY QuorumNonEmpty
    <3>2. PICK a \in Q2 : VotedFor(a, b2, v2) BY <1>5, <3>1
    <3>3. a \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption
    <3>4. SafeAt(b2, v2) BY <3>2, <3>3 DEF VotesSafe, Inv
    <3>5. b1 \in 0..(b2 - 1) BY <2>1 DEF Ballot
    <3>6. NoneOtherChoosableAt(b1, v2) BY <3>4, <3>5 DEF SafeAt
    <3>7. PICK Q3 \in Quorum :
           \A a3 \in Q3 : VotedFor(a3, b1, v2) \/ CannotVoteAt(a3, b1)
      BY <3>6 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
    <3>8. Q1 \cap Q3 # {} BY QuorumAssumption
    <3>9. PICK x \in Q1 \cap Q3 : TRUE BY <3>8
    <3>10. x \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption, <3>9
    <3>11. VotedFor(x, b1, v1) BY <1>4, <3>9
    <3>12. VotedFor(x, b1, v2) \/ CannotVoteAt(x, b1) BY <3>7, <3>9
    <3>13. ~ CannotVoteAt(x, b1)
      <4>1. ~ DidNotVoteAt(x, b1)
        <5>1. ASSUME DidNotVoteAt(x, b1) PROVE FALSE
          <6>1. ~ VotedFor(x, b1, v1) BY <5>1 DEF DidNotVoteAt
          <6>2. QED BY <6>1, <3>11
        <5>2. QED BY <5>1
      <4>2. QED BY <4>1 DEF CannotVoteAt
    <3>14. VotedFor(x, b1, v2) BY <3>12, <3>13
    <3>15. QED BY <3>11, <3>14, <3>10, OneVote_Lemma, <1>1
  <2>2. CASE b2 < b1
    <3>1. Q1 # {} BY QuorumNonEmpty
    <3>2. PICK a \in Q1 : VotedFor(a, b1, v1) BY <1>4, <3>1
    <3>3. a \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption
    <3>4. SafeAt(b1, v1) BY <3>2, <3>3 DEF VotesSafe, Inv
    <3>5. b2 \in 0..(b1 - 1) BY <2>2 DEF Ballot
    <3>6. NoneOtherChoosableAt(b2, v1) BY <3>4, <3>5 DEF SafeAt
    <3>7. PICK Q3 \in Quorum :
           \A a3 \in Q3 : VotedFor(a3, b2, v1) \/ CannotVoteAt(a3, b2)
      BY <3>6 DEF NoneOtherChoosableAt
    <3>8. Q2 \cap Q3 # {} BY QuorumAssumption
    <3>9. PICK x \in Q2 \cap Q3 : TRUE BY <3>8
    <3>10. x \in Acceptor BY QuorumAssumption, <3>9
    <3>11. VotedFor(x, b2, v2) BY <1>5, <3>9
    <3>12. VotedFor(x, b2, v1) \/ CannotVoteAt(x, b2) BY <3>7, <3>9
    <3>13. ~ CannotVoteAt(x, b2)
      <4>1. ~ DidNotVoteAt(x, b2)
        <5>1. ASSUME DidNotVoteAt(x, b2) PROVE FALSE
          <6>1. ~ VotedFor(x, b2, v2) BY <5>1 DEF DidNotVoteAt
          <6>2. QED BY <6>1, <3>11
        <5>2. QED BY <5>1
      <4>2. QED BY <4>1 DEF CannotVoteAt
    <3>14. VotedFor(x, b2, v1) BY <3>12, <3>13
    <3>15. QED BY <3>11, <3>14, <3>10, OneVote_Lemma, <1>1
  <2>3. QED BY <2>1, <2>2, <1>7 DEF Ballot
<1>8. QED BY <1>6, <1>7

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Refinement step: under invariants, [Next]_vars implies [C!Next]_chosen

LEMMA Refinement_Step ==
  ASSUME Inv, Inv', [Next]_vars
  PROVE  [C!Next]_chosen
PROOF
<1>1. SUFFICES ASSUME chosen' # chosen
               PROVE  C!Next
  BY DEF C!Next
<1>2. TypeOK BY DEF Inv
<1>3. chosen \subseteq chosen' BY Chosen_Monotone, <1>2
<1>4. chosen' \ chosen # {}
  <2>1. ASSUME chosen' \ chosen = {} PROVE FALSE
    <3>1. chosen' \subseteq chosen BY <2>1
    <3>2. chosen' = chosen BY <3>1, <1>3
    <3>3. QED BY <3>2, <1>1
  <2>2. QED BY <2>1
<1>5. PICK v \in chosen' \ chosen : TRUE BY <1>4
<1>6. v \in chosen' BY <1>5
<1>7. v \notin chosen BY <1>5
<1>8. v \in Value BY <1>6 DEF chosen
<1>9. chosen = {}
  <2>1. ASSUME chosen # {} PROVE FALSE
    <3>1. PICK w \in chosen : TRUE BY <2>1
    <3>2. w \in chosen' BY <3>1, <1>3
    <3>3. v = w BY <1>6, <3>2, Inv_ChosenSingleton, Inv'
    \* Wait, Inv_ChosenSingleton uses Inv. We need both v, w \in chosen' under Inv'.
    \* Hmm. Actually we need v \in chosen' \ chosen, so v \in chosen'.
    \* w \in chosen. Then under Inv, v could not be in chosen, so v # w (since w \in chosen, v \notin chosen).
    \* Under Inv', v, w \in chosen', so v = w. Contradiction.
    <3>4. v # w BY <1>7, <3>1
    <3>5. QED BY <3>3, <3>4
  <2>2. QED BY <2>1
<1>10. chosen' = {v}
  <2>1. SUFFICES ASSUME NEW w \in chosen', w # v PROVE FALSE
    BY <1>6
  <2>2. v = w BY <1>6, <2>1, Inv_ChosenSingleton, Inv'
  <2>3. QED BY <2>1, <2>2
<1>11. \E v0 \in Value : chosen' = {v0} BY <1>8, <1>10
<1>12. QED BY <1>9, <1>11 DEF C!Next

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
\* Main refinement theorem

THEOREM Refinement == Spec => C!Spec
PROOF
<1>1. Init => C!Init BY InitChosenEmpty DEF C!Init
<1>2. Inv /\ Inv' /\ [Next]_vars => [C!Next]_chosen BY Refinement_Step
<1>3. Spec => []Inv BY Spec_Inv
<1>4. Spec => [][Next]_vars BY PTL DEF Spec, vars
<1>5. Spec => Init BY PTL DEF Spec
<1>6. QED BY <1>1, <1>2, <1>3, <1>4, <1>5, PTL DEF Spec, C!Spec
